mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO SSQ.L_CDD_MNTN_DTLD ( MNTN_DATE , MNTN_STNR_CODE , CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID , CDD_FLFL_SQNO , MNTN_DTLS_CTNT , PRCE_DATE_TIME , ACTN_RSLT_SECT_CODE ) SELECT A.CDD_FLFL_DATE , 'CDD_115' , A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID , A.CDD_FLFL_SQNO , '자택연락처 : ' || CASE WHEN NVL(TRIM(U12.CNTY_PHON_CODE_CRYP), 'X') = 'X' THEN '공란, ' WHEN NVL(TRIM(U12.CNTY_PHON_CODE_CRYP), 'X') IN ('tRAMd7P/ZOo7TZTLnV8bgw==', 'ysLod0CISDzP7OZjoGN0Ig==') THEN '82/082, ' ELSE '' END || '직장연락처 : ' || CASE WHEN NVL(TRIM(U13.CNTY_PHON_CODE_CRYP), 'X') = 'X' THEN '공란' WHEN NVL(TRIM(U13.CNTY_PHON_CODE_CRYP), 'X') IN ('tRAMd7P/ZOo7TZTLnV8bgw==', 'ysLod0CISDzP7OZjoGN0Ig==') THEN '82/082' ELSE '' END , SYSDATE , 'N'
FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_DTLD A LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_CNTT_ADDR_IF B12 -- 개인CDD-자택 ON B12.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID AND B12.CDD_FLFL_SQNO = A.CDD_FLFL_SQNO AND B12.CDD_CNTT_ADDR_SECT_CODE = 'TEL' AND B12.CDD_CNTT_ADDR_TAGT_CODE = '12' LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUE_PHONE U12 ON U12.CNTT_ADDR_ID = B12.CNTT_ADDR_ID
LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_CNTT_ADDR_IF B13 -- 개인CDD-직장 ON B13.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID AND B13.CDD_FLFL_SQNO = A.CDD_FLFL_SQNO AND B13.CDD_CNTT_ADDR_SECT_CODE = 'TEL' AND B13.CDD_CNTT_ADDR_TAGT_CODE = '13' LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUE_PHONE U13 ON U13.CNTT_ADDR_ID = B13.CNTT_ADDR_ID WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.DEL_YN <> 'Y' AND TRIM(A.CDD_FLFL_DATE) IS NOT NULL AND A.CLNT_RISK_RTNG_CODE IN ('H', 'M', 'L') AND A.PRCE_CHNL_SECT_CODE LIKE 'A%' AND A.CDD_FLFL_DATE = #{yyyymmdd}
AND A.CDD_CMPL_YN = 'Y' AND A.CDD_CLNT_SECT_CODE = '1' -- 개인 AND A.NTNY_ID <> 1000000001 -- 소속국가ID AND A.RSDT_CNTY_ID <> 1000000001 -- 거주국가ID
AND NVL(TRIM(U12.CNTY_PHON_CODE_CRYP), 'X') IN ('tRAMd7P/ZOo7TZTLnV8bgw==', 'ysLod0CISDzP7OZjoGN0Ig==', 'X') AND NVL(TRIM(U13.CNTY_PHON_CODE_CRYP), 'X') IN ('tRAMd7P/ZOo7TZTLnV8bgw==', 'ysLod0CISDzP7OZjoGN0Ig==', 'X')

INSERT INTO SSQ.L_CDD_MNTN_DTLD ( MNTN_DATE , MNTN_STNR_CODE , CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID , CDD_FLFL_SQNO , MNTN_DTLS_CTNT , PRCE_DATE_TIME , ACTN_RSLT_SECT_CODE ) SELECT A.CDD_FLFL_DATE , 'CDD_116' , A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID , A.CDD_FLFL_SQNO , '자택전화/직장전화/국내연락처/휴대전화/E-mail 공란' , SYSDATE , 'N'
FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_DTLD A LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_CNTT_ADDR_IF B12_T -- 개인CDD-자택전화 ON B12_T.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID AND B12_T.CDD_FLFL_SQNO = A.CDD_FLFL_SQNO AND B12_T.CDD_CNTT_ADDR_SECT_CODE = 'TEL' AND B12_T.CDD_CNTT_ADDR_TAGT_CODE = '12'
LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_CNTT_ADDR_IF B13_T -- 개인CDD-직장전화 ON B13_T.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID AND B13_T.CDD_FLFL_SQNO = A.CDD_FLFL_SQNO AND B13_T.CDD_CNTT_ADDR_SECT_CODE = 'TEL' AND B13_T.CDD_CNTT_ADDR_TAGT_CODE = '13'
LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_CNTT_ADDR_IF B12_M -- 개인CDD-자택휴대폰 ON B12_M.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID AND B12_M.CDD_FLFL_SQNO = A.CDD_FLFL_SQNO AND B12_M.CDD_CNTT_ADDR_SECT_CODE = 'MOB' AND B12_M.CDD_CNTT_ADDR_TAGT_CODE = '12'
LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_CNTT_ADDR_IF B12_E -- 개인CDD-자택이메일 ON B12_E.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID AND B12_E.CDD_FLFL_SQNO = A.CDD_FLFL_SQNO AND B12_E.CDD_CNTT_ADDR_SECT_CODE = 'EML' AND B12_E.CDD_CNTT_ADDR_TAGT_CODE = '12'
LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_CNTT_ADDR_IF B14_T -- 개인CDD-실거소국내연락처 ON B14_T.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID AND B14_T.CDD_FLFL_SQNO = A.CDD_FLFL_SQNO AND B14_T.CDD_CNTT_ADDR_SECT_CODE = 'TEL' AND B14_T.CDD_CNTT_ADDR_TAGT_CODE = '14' WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.DEL_YN <> 'Y' AND TRIM(A.CDD_FLFL_DATE) IS NOT NULL AND A.CLNT_RISK_RTNG_CODE IN ('H', 'M', 'L') AND A.PRCE_CHNL_SECT_CODE LIKE 'A%' AND A.CDD_FLFL_DATE = #{yyyymmdd}
AND A.CDD_CMPL_YN = 'Y' AND A.CDD_CLNT_SECT_CODE = '1' -- 개인
AND NVL(TRIM(B12_T.CDD_CNTT_ADDR_SECT_CODE), 'X') = 'X' AND NVL(TRIM(B13_T.CDD_CNTT_ADDR_SECT_CODE), 'X') = 'X' AND NVL(TRIM(B12_M.CDD_CNTT_ADDR_SECT_CODE), 'X') = 'X' AND NVL(TRIM(B12_E.CDD_CNTT_ADDR_SECT_CODE), 'X') = 'X' AND NVL(TRIM(B14_T.CDD_CNTT_ADDR_SECT_CODE), 'X') = 'X'

INSERT INTO SSQ.L_CDD_MNTN_DTLD ( MNTN_DATE , MNTN_STNR_CODE , CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID , CDD_FLFL_SQNO , MNTN_DTLS_CTNT , PRCE_DATE_TIME , ACTN_RSLT_SECT_CODE ) SELECT A.CDD_FLFL_DATE , 'CDD_117' , A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID , A.CDD_FLFL_SQNO , CASE WHEN TRIM(JOB_CODE) IS NULL THEN '직업 : 공란' WHEN LENGTH(TRIM(A.JOB_CODE)) <> 3 THEN '직업코드 : ' || TRIM(A.JOB_CODE) ELSE '' END , SYSDATE , 'N'
FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_DTLD A WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.DEL_YN <> 'Y' AND TRIM(A.CDD_FLFL_DATE) IS NOT NULL AND A.CLNT_RISK_RTNG_CODE IN ('H', 'M', 'L') AND A.PRCE_CHNL_SECT_CODE LIKE 'A%' AND A.CDD_FLFL_DATE = #{yyyymmdd}
AND A.CDD_CMPL_YN = 'Y' AND A.CDD_CLNT_SECT_CODE = '1' -- 개인
AND (LENGTH(TRIM(A.JOB_CODE)) <> 3 OR TRIM(JOB_CODE) IS NULL)

INSERT INTO SSQ.L_CDD_MNTN_DTLD ( MNTN_DATE , MNTN_STNR_CODE , CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID , CDD_FLFL_SQNO , MNTN_DTLS_CTNT , PRCE_DATE_TIME , ACTN_RSLT_SECT_CODE ) SELECT A.CDD_FLFL_DATE , 'CDD_118' , A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID , A.CDD_FLFL_SQNO , '위험등급 : ' || A.CLNT_RISK_RTNG_CODE || ', 직업 : ' || TRIM(JOB_CODE) || '.' || NVL((SELECT CMN_CDVL_NAME FROM SID.IDO_A_UWB_COM_CD_DTL WHERE CMN_CODE_ID = '01437' AND CMN_CDVL = A.JOB_CODE), ' ') , SYSDATE , 'N'
FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_DTLD A INNER JOIN SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_RISK_INDR_MN B /* CDD위험지표관리 */ ON TRIM(B.RISK_DTLS_CODE) = A.JOB_CODE AND RISK_LARG_CLSN_CODE = 'CLNT' AND RISK_MDUM_CLSN_CODE = 'JOB' AND CDD_RGTY_RISK_SECT_CODE = 'Y' WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.DEL_YN <> 'Y' AND TRIM(A.CDD_FLFL_DATE) IS NOT NULL AND A.CLNT_RISK_RTNG_CODE IN ('H', 'M', 'L') AND A.PRCE_CHNL_SECT_CODE LIKE 'A%' AND A.CDD_FLFL_DATE = #{yyyymmdd}
AND A.CDD_CMPL_YN = 'Y' AND A.CDD_CLNT_SECT_CODE = '1' -- 개인
AND A.CLNT_RISK_RTNG_CODE <> 'H'

INSERT INTO SSQ.L_CDD_MNTN_DTLD ( MNTN_DATE , MNTN_STNR_CODE , CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID , CDD_FLFL_SQNO , MNTN_DTLS_CTNT , PRCE_DATE_TIME , ACTN_RSLT_SECT_CODE ) SELECT A.CDD_FLFL_DATE , 'CDD_119' , A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID , A.CDD_FLFL_SQNO , '직업 : ' || TRIM(JOB_CODE) || '.' || NVL((SELECT TRIM(INI_ITEM_NAME) FROM SID.IDO_A_UWB_INI_ITM WHERE INI_GROP_CODE = '00311' AND USE_YN = 'Y' AND INI_ITEM_CODE = SUBSTR(A.JOB_CODE, 1, 1)), ' ') || '_기타' , SYSDATE , 'N'
FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_DTLD A WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.DEL_YN <> 'Y' AND TRIM(A.CDD_FLFL_DATE) IS NOT NULL AND A.CLNT_RISK_RTNG_CODE IN ('H', 'M', 'L') AND A.PRCE_CHNL_SECT_CODE LIKE 'A%' AND A.CDD_FLFL_DATE = #{yyyymmdd}
AND A.CDD_CMPL_YN = 'Y' AND A.CDD_CLNT_SECT_CODE = '1' -- 개인
AND A.JOB_CODE IN ('190', '290', '390', '490', '990') AND TRIM(A.JOB_NAME) IS NULL

INSERT INTO SSQ.L_CDD_MNTN_DTLD ( MNTN_DATE , MNTN_STNR_CODE , CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID , CDD_FLFL_SQNO , MNTN_DTLS_CTNT , PRCE_DATE_TIME , ACTN_RSLT_SECT_CODE ) SELECT A.CDD_FLFL_DATE , 'CDD_120' , A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID , A.CDD_FLFL_SQNO , '법인운영자금여부 : Y' , SYSDATE , 'N'
FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_DTLD A WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.DEL_YN <> 'Y' AND TRIM(A.CDD_FLFL_DATE) IS NOT NULL AND A.CLNT_RISK_RTNG_CODE IN ('H', 'M', 'L') AND A.PRCE_CHNL_SECT_CODE LIKE 'A%' AND A.CDD_FLFL_DATE = #{yyyymmdd}
AND A.CDD_CMPL_YN = 'Y' AND A.CDD_CLNT_SECT_CODE = '1' -- 개인
AND A.INSN_OPRN_FUNS_YN = 'Y'

INSERT INTO SSQ.L_CDD_MNTN_DTLD ( MNTN_DATE , MNTN_STNR_CODE , CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID , CDD_FLFL_SQNO , MNTN_DTLS_CTNT , PRCE_DATE_TIME , ACTN_RSLT_SECT_CODE ) SELECT A.CDD_FLFL_DATE , 'CDD_121' , A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID , A.CDD_FLFL_SQNO , '사업장/본점의 전화번호/휴대전화 공란' , SYSDATE , 'N'
FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_DTLD A LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_CNTT_ADDR_IF B21_T -- 법인사업장-전화 ON B21_T.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID AND B21_T.CDD_FLFL_SQNO = A.CDD_FLFL_SQNO AND B21_T.CDD_CNTT_ADDR_SECT_CODE = 'TEL' AND B21_T.CDD_CNTT_ADDR_TAGT_CODE = '21'
LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_CNTT_ADDR_IF B21_M -- 법인사업장-휴대전화 ON B21_M.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID AND B21_M.CDD_FLFL_SQNO = A.CDD_FLFL_SQNO AND B21_M.CDD_CNTT_ADDR_SECT_CODE = 'MOB' AND B21_M.CDD_CNTT_ADDR_TAGT_CODE = '21'
LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_CNTT_ADDR_IF B22_T -- 법인본점-전화 ON B22_T.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID AND B22_T.CDD_FLFL_SQNO = A.CDD_FLFL_SQNO AND B22_T.CDD_CNTT_ADDR_SECT_CODE = 'TEL' AND B22_T.CDD_CNTT_ADDR_TAGT_CODE = '22'
LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_CNTT_ADDR_IF B22_M -- 법인본점-휴대전화 ON B22_M.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID AND B22_M.CDD_FLFL_SQNO = A.CDD_FLFL_SQNO AND B22_M.CDD_CNTT_ADDR_SECT_CODE = 'MOB' AND B22_M.CDD_CNTT_ADDR_TAGT_CODE = '22'
WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.DEL_YN <> 'Y' AND TRIM(A.CDD_FLFL_DATE) IS NOT NULL AND A.CLNT_RISK_RTNG_CODE IN ('H', 'M', 'L') AND A.PRCE_CHNL_SECT_CODE LIKE 'A%' AND A.CDD_FLFL_DATE = #{yyyymmdd}
AND A.CDD_CMPL_YN = 'Y' AND A.CDD_CLNT_SECT_CODE IN ('2', '3') -- 법인
AND NVL(TRIM(B21_T.CDD_CNTT_ADDR_SECT_CODE), 'X') = 'X' AND NVL(TRIM(B21_M.CDD_CNTT_ADDR_SECT_CODE), 'X') = 'X' AND NVL(TRIM(B22_T.CDD_CNTT_ADDR_SECT_CODE), 'X') = 'X' AND NVL(TRIM(B22_M.CDD_CNTT_ADDR_SECT_CODE), 'X') = 'X'

INSERT INTO SSQ.L_CDD_MNTN_DTLD ( MNTN_DATE , MNTN_STNR_CODE , CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID , CDD_FLFL_SQNO , MNTN_DTLS_CTNT , PRCE_DATE_TIME , ACTN_RSLT_SECT_CODE ) SELECT A.CDD_FLFL_DATE , 'CDD_122' , A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID , A.CDD_FLFL_SQNO , CASE WHEN NVL(TRIM(B21_A.CDD_CNTT_ADDR_SECT_CODE), 'X') = 'X' THEN '사업장주소 : 공란' || CASE WHEN NVL(TRIM(B22_A.CDD_CNTT_ADDR_SECT_CODE), 'X') = 'X' THEN ', 본점주소 : 공란' ELSE '' END ELSE CASE WHEN NVL(TRIM(B22_A.CDD_CNTT_ADDR_SECT_CODE), 'X') = 'X' THEN '본점주소 : 공란' ELSE '' END END , SYSDATE , 'N'
FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_DTLD A LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_CNTT_ADDR_IF B21_A -- 법인사업장-주소 ON B21_A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID AND B21_A.CDD_FLFL_SQNO = A.CDD_FLFL_SQNO AND B21_A.CDD_CNTT_ADDR_SECT_CODE = 'ADR' AND B21_A.CDD_CNTT_ADDR_TAGT_CODE = '21'
LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_CNTT_ADDR_IF B22_A -- 법인본점-주소 ON B22_A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID AND B22_A.CDD_FLFL_SQNO = A.CDD_FLFL_SQNO AND B22_A.CDD_CNTT_ADDR_SECT_CODE = 'ADR' AND B22_A.CDD_CNTT_ADDR_TAGT_CODE = '22'
WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.DEL_YN <> 'Y' AND TRIM(A.CDD_FLFL_DATE) IS NOT NULL AND A.CLNT_RISK_RTNG_CODE IN ('H', 'M', 'L') AND A.PRCE_CHNL_SECT_CODE LIKE 'A%' AND A.CDD_FLFL_DATE = #{yyyymmdd}
AND A.CDD_CMPL_YN = 'Y' AND A.CDD_CLNT_SECT_CODE IN ('2', '3') -- 법인
AND (NVL(TRIM(B21_A.CDD_CNTT_ADDR_SECT_CODE), 'X') = 'X' OR NVL(TRIM(B22_A.CDD_CNTT_ADDR_SECT_CODE), 'X') = 'X')

INSERT INTO SSQ.L_CDD_MNTN_DTLD ( MNTN_DATE , MNTN_STNR_CODE , CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID , CDD_FLFL_SQNO , MNTN_DTLS_CTNT , PRCE_DATE_TIME , ACTN_RSLT_SECT_CODE ) SELECT A.CDD_FLFL_DATE , 'CDD_123' , A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID , A.CDD_FLFL_SQNO , '영문(해외)주소 미존재(소속국가 : ' || NVL(R1.CNTY_CODE, 'XX') || '.' || NVL((SELECT TRIM(T.CNTY_NAME) FROM SID.IDO_A_UUE_COUNTRY_NAME T WHERE T.LANG_CODE = 'KO' AND T.CNTY_ID = A.NTNY_ID AND ROWNUM = 1 ), '') || ', 거주국가 : ' || NVL(R2.CNTY_CODE, 'XX') || '.' || NVL((SELECT TRIM(T.CNTY_NAME) FROM SID.IDO_A_UUE_COUNTRY_NAME T WHERE T.LANG_CODE = 'KO' AND T.CNTY_ID = A.RSDT_CNTY_ID AND ROWNUM = 1 ), '') || ')' , SYSDATE , 'N'
FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_DTLD A LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_CNTT_ADDR_IF B21_A -- 법인사업장-주소 ON B21_A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID AND B21_A.CDD_FLFL_SQNO = A.CDD_FLFL_SQNO AND B21_A.CDD_CNTT_ADDR_SECT_CODE = 'ADR' AND B21_A.CDD_CNTT_ADDR_TAGT_CODE = '21' LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUE_ADDRESS U21 ON U21.CNTT_ADDR_ID = B21_A.CNTT_ADDR_ID
LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_CNTT_ADDR_IF B22_A -- 법인본점-주소 ON B22_A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID AND B22_A.CDD_FLFL_SQNO = A.CDD_FLFL_SQNO AND B22_A.CDD_CNTT_ADDR_SECT_CODE = 'ADR' AND B22_A.CDD_CNTT_ADDR_TAGT_CODE = '22' LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUE_ADDRESS U22 ON U22.CNTT_ADDR_ID = B22_A.CNTT_ADDR_ID
LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUE_COUNTRY R1 ON A.NTNY_ID = R1.CNTY_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUE_COUNTRY R2 ON A.RSDT_CNTY_ID = R2.CNTY_ID
WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.DEL_YN <> 'Y' AND TRIM(A.CDD_FLFL_DATE) IS NOT NULL AND A.CLNT_RISK_RTNG_CODE IN ('H', 'M', 'L') AND A.PRCE_CHNL_SECT_CODE LIKE 'A%' AND A.CDD_FLFL_DATE = #{yyyymmdd}
AND A.CDD_CMPL_YN = 'Y' AND A.CDD_CLNT_SECT_CODE IN ('2', '3') -- 법인
AND A.NTNY_ID > 0 AND A.NTNY_ID <> 1000000001 -- 소속국가ID AND A.RSDT_CNTY_ID > 0 AND A.RSDT_CNTY_ID <> 1000000001 -- 거주국가ID
AND ((TRIM(U21.PSTL_CODE) NOT IN ('00000', '000000') OR NVL(TRIM(U21.PSTL_CODE), 'X') = 'X') AND (TRIM(U22.PSTL_CODE) NOT IN ('00000', '000000') OR NVL(TRIM(U22.PSTL_CODE), 'X') = 'X'))

INSERT INTO SSQ.L_CDD_MNTN_DTLD ( MNTN_DATE , MNTN_STNR_CODE , CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID , CDD_FLFL_SQNO , MNTN_DTLS_CTNT , PRCE_DATE_TIME , ACTN_RSLT_SECT_CODE ) SELECT A.CDD_FLFL_DATE , 'CDD_124' , A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID , A.CDD_FLFL_SQNO , '대표자정보오류' || CASE WHEN TRIM(A.RPST_1_NAME) IS NULL AND TRIM(A.RPST_2_NAME) IS NULL AND TRIM(A.RPST_3_NAME) IS NULL THEN ';대표자 미입력'
WHEN TRIM(A.RPST_1_NAME) IS NOT NULL AND A.RPST_1_NTNY_ID = 0 THEN ';대표자1 소속국적 미입력' WHEN TRIM(A.RPST_1_NAME) IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(A.RPST_1_BRDT) IS NULL THEN ';대표자1 생년월일 미입력'
WHEN TRIM(A.RPST_2_NAME) IS NOT NULL AND A.RPST_2_NTNY_ID = 0 THEN ';대표자2 소속국적 미입력' WHEN TRIM(A.RPST_2_NAME) IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(A.RPST_2_BRDT) IS NULL THEN ';대표자2 생년월일 미입력'
WHEN TRIM(A.RPST_3_NAME) IS NOT NULL AND A.RPST_3_NTNY_ID = 0 THEN ';대표자3 소속국적 미입력' WHEN TRIM(A.RPST_3_NAME) IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(A.RPST_3_BRDT) IS NULL THEN ';대표자3 생년월일 미입력'
WHEN TRIM(A.RPST_1_BRDT) IS NOT NULL AND NVL(X1.DATE_ANLY_SDVL, 'X') = 'X' THEN ';대표자1 생년월일 미존재날짜' WHEN TRIM(A.RPST_2_BRDT) IS NOT NULL AND NVL(X2.DATE_ANLY_SDVL, 'X') = 'X' THEN ';대표자2 생년월일 미존재날짜' WHEN TRIM(A.RPST_3_BRDT) IS NOT NULL AND NVL(X3.DATE_ANLY_SDVL, 'X') = 'X' THEN ';대표자3 생년월일 미존재날짜'
ELSE '' END AS MNTN_DTLS_CTNT , SYSDATE , 'N'
FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_DTLD A LEFT OUTER JOIN SSQ.L_DATE_STND_VALU X1 ON X1.DATE_TYPE_SDVL = 'YYYYMMDD' AND X1.DATE_ANLY_SDVL = A.RPST_1_BRDT LEFT OUTER JOIN SSQ.L_DATE_STND_VALU X2 ON X2.DATE_TYPE_SDVL = 'YYYYMMDD' AND X2.DATE_ANLY_SDVL = A.RPST_2_BRDT LEFT OUTER JOIN SSQ.L_DATE_STND_VALU X3 ON X3.DATE_TYPE_SDVL = 'YYYYMMDD' AND X3.DATE_ANLY_SDVL = A.RPST_3_BRDT
WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.DEL_YN <> 'Y' AND TRIM(A.CDD_FLFL_DATE) IS NOT NULL AND A.CLNT_RISK_RTNG_CODE IN ('H', 'M', 'L') AND A.PRCE_CHNL_SECT_CODE LIKE 'A%' AND A.CDD_FLFL_DATE = #{yyyymmdd}
AND A.CDD_CMPL_YN = 'Y' AND A.CDD_CLNT_SECT_CODE IN ('2', '3') -- 법인
-- 대표자명이 모두 미존재 AND ((TRIM(A.RPST_1_NAME) IS NULL AND TRIM(A.RPST_2_NAME) IS NULL AND TRIM(A.RPST_3_NAME) IS NULL)
-- 대표자명1이 존재하는데 소속국가1, 생년월일1 미존재 OR (TRIM(A.RPST_1_NAME) IS NOT NULL AND (A.RPST_1_NTNY_ID = 0 OR TRIM(A.RPST_1_BRDT) IS NULL OR LENGTH(TRIM(A.RPST_1_BRDT)) <> 8)) -- 대표자명2이 존재하는데 소속국가2, 생년월일2 미존재 OR (TRIM(A.RPST_2_NAME) IS NOT NULL AND (A.RPST_2_NTNY_ID = 0 OR TRIM(A.RPST_2_BRDT) IS NULL OR LENGTH(TRIM(A.RPST_2_BRDT)) <> 8)) -- 대표자명3이 존재하는데 소속국가3, 생년월일3 미존재 OR (TRIM(A.RPST_3_NAME) IS NOT NULL AND (A.RPST_3_NTNY_ID = 0 OR TRIM(A.RPST_3_BRDT) IS NULL OR LENGTH(TRIM(A.RPST_3_BRDT)) <> 8))
-- 대표자 생년월일 유효성 체크 OR (TRIM(A.RPST_1_BRDT) IS NOT NULL AND NVL(X1.DATE_ANLY_SDVL, 'X') = 'X') OR (TRIM(A.RPST_2_BRDT) IS NOT NULL AND NVL(X2.DATE_ANLY_SDVL, 'X') = 'X') OR (TRIM(A.RPST_3_BRDT) IS NOT NULL AND NVL(X3.DATE_ANLY_SDVL, 'X') = 'X'))

INSERT INTO SSQ.L_CDD_MNTN_DTLD ( MNTN_DATE , MNTN_STNR_CODE , CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID , CDD_FLFL_SQNO , MNTN_DTLS_CTNT , PRCE_DATE_TIME , ACTN_RSLT_SECT_CODE ) SELECT A.CDD_FLFL_DATE , 'CDD_125' , A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID , A.CDD_FLFL_SQNO , CASE WHEN TRIM(A.STND_INDY_CLSN_CODE) IS NULL THEN '업종 누락' WHEN TRIM(A.STND_INDY_CLSN_CODE) IS NOT NULL AND NVL(B.STND_INDY_CLSN_CODE, 'X') = 'X' THEN '미존재 업종코드 : ' || TRIM(A.STND_INDY_CLSN_CODE) ELSE ' ' END AS MNTN_DTLS_CTNT , SYSDATE , 'N'
FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_DTLD A LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUE_INDY_CLSN B ON B.INDY_CLSN_TYPE_CODE = 'KS' AND B.STND_INDY_CLSN_CODE = A.STND_INDY_CLSN_CODE
WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.DEL_YN <> 'Y' AND TRIM(A.CDD_FLFL_DATE) IS NOT NULL AND A.CLNT_RISK_RTNG_CODE IN ('H', 'M', 'L') AND A.PRCE_CHNL_SECT_CODE LIKE 'A%' AND A.CDD_FLFL_DATE = #{yyyymmdd}
AND A.CDD_CMPL_YN = 'Y' AND A.CDD_CLNT_SECT_CODE = '2' -- 영리법인
AND (TRIM(A.STND_INDY_CLSN_CODE) IS NULL OR LENGTH(TRIM(A.STND_INDY_CLSN_CODE)) <> 5 OR NVL(B.STND_INDY_CLSN_CODE, 'X') = 'X')

INSERT INTO SSQ.L_CDD_MNTN_DTLD ( MNTN_DATE , MNTN_STNR_CODE , CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID , CDD_FLFL_SQNO , MNTN_DTLS_CTNT , PRCE_DATE_TIME , ACTN_RSLT_SECT_CODE ) SELECT A.CDD_FLFL_DATE , 'CDD_126' , A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID , A.CDD_FLFL_SQNO , '위험등급 : ' || A.CLNT_RISK_RTNG_CODE || ', 업종 : ' || TRIM(A.STND_INDY_CLSN_CODE) || '.' || NVL(TRIM(D.DSCN_CTNT), ' ') , SYSDATE , 'N'
FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_DTLD A INNER JOIN SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_RISK_INDR_MN B /* CDD위험지표관리 */ ON TRIM(B.RISK_DTLS_CODE) = A.STND_INDY_CLSN_CODE AND RISK_LARG_CLSN_CODE = 'CLNT' AND RISK_MDUM_CLSN_CODE = 'INKN' AND CDD_RGTY_RISK_SECT_CODE = 'Y' LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUE_INDY_CLSN C ON C.INDY_CLSN_TYPE_CODE = 'KS' AND C.STND_INDY_CLSN_CODE = A.STND_INDY_CLSN_CODE LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUE_INDY_CLASS_DESC D ON D.INDY_CLSN_ID = C.INDY_CLSN_ID AND D.LANG_CODE = 'KO'
WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.DEL_YN <> 'Y' AND TRIM(A.CDD_FLFL_DATE) IS NOT NULL AND A.CLNT_RISK_RTNG_CODE IN ('H', 'M', 'L') AND A.PRCE_CHNL_SECT_CODE LIKE 'A%' AND A.CDD_FLFL_DATE = #{yyyymmdd}
AND A.CDD_CMPL_YN = 'Y' AND A.CDD_CLNT_SECT_CODE = '2' -- 영리법인 AND A.CLNT_RISK_RTNG_CODE <> 'H'

INSERT INTO SSQ.L_CDD_MNTN_DTLD ( MNTN_DATE , MNTN_STNR_CODE , CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID , CDD_FLFL_SQNO , MNTN_DTLS_CTNT , PRCE_DATE_TIME , ACTN_RSLT_SECT_CODE ) SELECT A.CDD_FLFL_DATE , 'CDD_127' , A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID , A.CDD_FLFL_SQNO , '설립목적 : ' || CASE WHEN TRIM(A.ESTT_PRPS_CODE) IS NULL THEN '미입력' WHEN LENGTH(TRIM(A.ESTT_PRPS_CODE)) > 0 AND NVL(T.CMN_CDVL , 'X') = 'X' THEN '미존재 코드(' || TRIM(A.ESTT_PRPS_CODE) || ')' ELSE ' ' END AS MNTN_DTLS_CTNT , SYSDATE , 'N'
FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_DTLD A LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UWB_COM_CD_DTL T ON T.CMN_CODE_ID = '06751' AND T.CMN_CDVL = A.ESTT_PRPS_CODE
WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.DEL_YN <> 'Y' AND TRIM(A.CDD_FLFL_DATE) IS NOT NULL AND A.CLNT_RISK_RTNG_CODE IN ('H', 'M', 'L') AND A.PRCE_CHNL_SECT_CODE LIKE 'A%' AND A.CDD_FLFL_DATE = #{yyyymmdd}
AND A.CDD_CMPL_YN = 'Y' AND A.CDD_CLNT_SECT_CODE = '3' -- 비영리법인 AND (TRIM(A.ESTT_PRPS_CODE) IS NULL OR (LENGTH(TRIM(A.ESTT_PRPS_CODE)) > 0 AND NVL(T.CMN_CDVL , 'X') = 'X'))

INSERT INTO SSQ.L_CDD_MNTN_DTLD ( MNTN_DATE , MNTN_STNR_CODE , CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID , CDD_FLFL_SQNO , MNTN_DTLS_CTNT , PRCE_DATE_TIME , ACTN_RSLT_SECT_CODE ) SELECT A.CDD_FLFL_DATE , 'CDD_128' , A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID , A.CDD_FLFL_SQNO , '처리채널 : ' || TRIM(A.PRCE_CHNL_SECT_CODE) || '.' || NVL(TRIM(C.CHNL_SECT_NAME), '') || ', 거래목적 : ' || CASE WHEN TRIM(B.NDVL_TRDG_PRPS_CODE) IS NULL THEN 'X' ELSE 'O' END || ', 거래자금의원천및출처 : ' || CASE WHEN TRIM(B.NDVL_FUNS_ORIG_CODE) IS NULL THEN 'X' ELSE 'O' END || CASE WHEN SUBSTR(A.PRCE_CHNL_SECT_CODE, 1, 1) = 'A' THEN ', 예상거래횟수 : ' || CASE WHEN TRIM(B.NDVL_FRCT_TRDG_CNT_CODE) IS NULL THEN 'X' ELSE 'O' END || ', 예상거래규모 : ' || CASE WHEN TRIM(B.NDVL_FRCT_TRDG_SCL_CODE) IS NULL THEN 'X' ELSE 'O' END ELSE '' END AS MNTN_DTLS_CTNT , SYSDATE , 'N'
FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_DTLD A LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_MAH_EDD_FLFL_DTLD B ON B.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID AND B.CDD_FLFL_SQNO = A.CDD_FLFL_SQNO LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UWB_CHANNEL_CD C ON C.CHNL_SECT_CODE = A.PRCE_CHNL_SECT_CODE
WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.DEL_YN <> 'Y' AND TRIM(A.CDD_FLFL_DATE) IS NOT NULL AND A.CLNT_RISK_RTNG_CODE IN ('H', 'M', 'L') --AND A.PRCE_CHNL_SECT_CODE LIKE 'A%' AND A.CDD_FLFL_DATE = #{yyyymmdd}
AND A.CDD_CMPL_YN = 'Y' AND A.CDD_CLNT_SECT_CODE = '1' -- 개인 AND A.EDD_TAGT_YN = 'Y'
AND (TRIM(B.NDVL_TRDG_PRPS_CODE) IS NULL OR TRIM(B.NDVL_FUNS_ORIG_CODE) IS NULL OR (SUBSTR(A.PRCE_CHNL_SECT_CODE, 1, 1) = 'A' AND (TRIM(B.NDVL_FRCT_TRDG_CNT_CODE) IS NULL OR TRIM(B.NDVL_FRCT_TRDG_SCL_CODE) IS NULL)))

INSERT INTO SSQ.L_CDD_MNTN_DTLD ( MNTN_DATE , MNTN_STNR_CODE , CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID , CDD_FLFL_SQNO , MNTN_DTLS_CTNT , PRCE_DATE_TIME , ACTN_RSLT_SECT_CODE ) SELECT A.CDD_FLFL_DATE , 'CDD_129' , A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID , A.CDD_FLFL_SQNO , '거래목적 : ' || CASE WHEN TRIM(B.INSN_TRDG_PRPS_CODE) IS NULL THEN 'X' ELSE 'O' END || ', 거래자금의원천및출처 : ' || CASE WHEN TRIM(B.INSN_FUNS_ORIG_CODE) IS NULL THEN 'X' ELSE 'O' END || ', 예상거래횟수 : ' || CASE WHEN TRIM(B.INSN_FRCT_TRDG_CNT_CODE) IS NULL THEN 'X' ELSE 'O' END || ', 예상거래규모 : ' || CASE WHEN TRIM(B.INSN_FRCT_TRDG_SCL_CODE) IS NULL THEN 'X' ELSE 'O' END || ', 법인규모구분 : ' || CASE WHEN TRIM(B.INSN_SCL_SECT_CODE) IS NULL THEN 'X' ELSE 'O' END || ', 상장정보 : ' || CASE WHEN TRIM(B.INSN_LSTG_MRKT_CODE) IS NULL THEN 'X' ELSE 'O' END || '(' || NVL((SELECT TRIM(CMN_CDVL_NAME) FROM SID.IDO_A_UWB_COM_CD_DTL WHERE CMN_CODE_ID = '06746' AND CMN_CDVL = B.INSN_LSTG_MRKT_CODE), ' ') || ')' || ', 상장거래소명 : ' || CASE WHEN TRIM(B.INSN_LSTG_MRKT_NAME) IS NULL THEN 'X' ELSE 'O' END || ', 홈페이지(이메일) : ' || CASE WHEN NVL(TRIM(U.CDD_CNTT_ADDR_SECT_CODE), 'X') = 'X' THEN 'X' ELSE 'O' END AS MNTN_DTLS_CTNT , SYSDATE , 'N'
FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_DTLD A LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_MAH_EDD_FLFL_DTLD B ON B.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID AND B.CDD_FLFL_SQNO = A.CDD_FLFL_SQNO LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_CNTT_ADDR_IF U ON U.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID AND U.CDD_FLFL_SQNO = A.CDD_FLFL_SQNO AND U.CDD_CNTT_ADDR_TAGT_CODE = '23' AND U.CDD_CNTT_ADDR_SECT_CODE = 'URL'
WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.DEL_YN <> 'Y' AND TRIM(A.CDD_FLFL_DATE) IS NOT NULL AND A.CLNT_RISK_RTNG_CODE IN ('H', 'M', 'L') AND A.PRCE_CHNL_SECT_CODE LIKE 'A%' AND A.CDD_FLFL_DATE = #{yyyymmdd}
AND A.CDD_CMPL_YN = 'Y' AND A.CDD_CLNT_SECT_CODE IN ('2', '3') -- 법인 AND A.EDD_TAGT_YN = 'Y'
AND (TRIM(B.INSN_TRDG_PRPS_CODE) IS NULL OR TRIM(B.INSN_FUNS_ORIG_CODE) IS NULL OR TRIM(B.INSN_FRCT_TRDG_CNT_CODE) IS NULL OR TRIM(B.INSN_FRCT_TRDG_SCL_CODE) IS NULL OR TRIM(B.INSN_SCL_SECT_CODE) IS NULL OR TRIM(B.INSN_LSTG_MRKT_CODE) IS NULL OR (TRIM(B.INSN_LSTG_MRKT_CODE) = '04' AND TRIM(B.INSN_LSTG_MRKT_NAME) IS NULL) OR NVL(TRIM(U.CDD_CNTT_ADDR_SECT_CODE), 'X') = 'X')

INSERT INTO SSQ.L_CDD_MNTN_DTLD ( MNTN_DATE , MNTN_STNR_CODE , CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID , CDD_FLFL_SQNO , MNTN_DTLS_CTNT , PRCE_DATE_TIME , ACTN_RSLT_SECT_CODE ) SELECT A.CDD_FLFL_DATE , 'CDD_130' , A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID , A.CDD_FLFL_SQNO , '실제소유자여부 : ' || CASE WHEN TRIM(A.REL_OWNR_YN) IS NULL THEN '공란' ELSE TRIM(A.REL_OWNR_YN) END AS MNTN_DTLS_CTNT , SYSDATE , 'N'
FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_DTLD A
WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.DEL_YN <> 'Y' AND TRIM(A.CDD_FLFL_DATE) IS NOT NULL AND A.CLNT_RISK_RTNG_CODE IN ('H', 'M', 'L') AND A.PRCE_CHNL_SECT_CODE LIKE 'A%' AND A.CDD_FLFL_DATE = #{yyyymmdd}
AND A.CDD_CMPL_YN = 'Y' AND A.CDD_CLNT_SECT_CODE = '1' -- 개인
AND A.REL_OWNR_YN NOT IN ('Y', 'N')

INSERT INTO SSQ.L_CDD_MNTN_DTLD ( MNTN_DATE , MNTN_STNR_CODE , CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID , CDD_FLFL_SQNO , MNTN_DTLS_CTNT , PRCE_DATE_TIME , ACTN_RSLT_SECT_CODE ) SELECT A.CDD_FLFL_DATE , 'CDD_131' , A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID , A.CDD_FLFL_SQNO , '당사자구분 : 대리인, 실제소유자여부 : 본인아님' , SYSDATE , 'N'
FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_DTLD A
WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.DEL_YN <> 'Y' AND TRIM(A.CDD_FLFL_DATE) IS NOT NULL AND A.CLNT_RISK_RTNG_CODE IN ('H', 'M', 'L') --AND A.PRCE_CHNL_SECT_CODE LIKE 'A%' AND A.CDD_FLFL_DATE = #{yyyymmdd}
AND A.CDD_CMPL_YN = 'Y' AND A.CDD_CLNT_SECT_CODE = '1' -- 개인
AND A.CDD_TAGT_SECT_CODE = '02' -- 대리인 AND A.REL_OWNR_YN = 'N'

INSERT INTO SSQ.L_CDD_MNTN_DTLD ( MNTN_DATE , MNTN_STNR_CODE , CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID , CDD_FLFL_SQNO , MNTN_DTLS_CTNT , PRCE_DATE_TIME , ACTN_RSLT_SECT_CODE ) SELECT A.CDD_FLFL_DATE , 'CDD_132' , A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID , A.CDD_FLFL_SQNO , '성명 : ' || CASE WHEN NVL(TRIM(B.REL_OWNR_NAME) , 'X') = 'X' THEN 'X' ELSE 'O' END || ', 소속국가 : ' || CASE WHEN NVL(B.REL_OWNR_NTNY_ID , 0 ) = 0 THEN 'X' ELSE 'O' END || ', 주민등록번호 : ' || CASE WHEN NVL(TRIM(B.REL_OWNR_CLNT_NO_CRYP) , 'X') = 'X' THEN 'X' ELSE 'O' END || ', 관계 : ' || CASE WHEN NVL(TRIM(B.REL_OWNR_RLTP_CODE) , 'X') = 'X' THEN 'X' ELSE 'O' END || ', 생년월일 : ' || CASE WHEN NVL(TRIM(B.REL_OWNR_BRDT) , 'X') = 'X' THEN 'X' ELSE 'O' END || ', 성별 : ' || CASE WHEN NVL(TRIM(B.REL_OWNR_GNDR_SECT_CODE), 'X') = 'X' THEN 'X' ELSE 'O' END AS MNTN_DTLS_CTNT , SYSDATE , 'N'
FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_DTLD A LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_REL_OWNR_IFMN B ON B.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID AND B.CDD_FLFL_SQNO = A.CDD_FLFL_SQNO AND B.REL_OWNR_SQNO = 1
WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.DEL_YN <> 'Y' AND TRIM(A.CDD_FLFL_DATE) IS NOT NULL AND A.CLNT_RISK_RTNG_CODE IN ('H', 'M', 'L') AND A.PRCE_CHNL_SECT_CODE LIKE 'A%' AND A.CDD_FLFL_DATE = #{yyyymmdd}
AND A.CDD_CMPL_YN = 'Y' AND A.CDD_CLNT_SECT_CODE = '1' -- 개인
AND A.REL_OWNR_YN = 'N'
AND (NVL(TRIM(B.REL_OWNR_NAME), 'X') = 'X' OR NVL(B.REL_OWNR_NTNY_ID, 0) = 0 OR (B.REL_OWNR_NTNY_ID = 1000000001 AND (NVL(TRIM(B.REL_OWNR_CLNT_NO_CRYP), 'X') = 'X' OR NVL(TRIM(B.REL_OWNR_RLTP_CODE), 'X') = 'X')) OR (B.REL_OWNR_NTNY_ID > 0 AND B.REL_OWNR_NTNY_ID <> 1000000001 AND (NVL(TRIM(B.REL_OWNR_RLTP_CODE), 'X') = 'X' OR NVL(TRIM(B.REL_OWNR_BRDT), 'X') = 'X' OR NVL(TRIM(B.REL_OWNR_GNDR_SECT_CODE), 'X') = 'X')))

INSERT INTO SSQ.L_CDD_MNTN_DTLD ( MNTN_DATE , MNTN_STNR_CODE , CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID , CDD_FLFL_SQNO , MNTN_DTLS_CTNT , PRCE_DATE_TIME , ACTN_RSLT_SECT_CODE ) SELECT A.CDD_FLFL_DATE , 'CDD_133' , A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID , A.CDD_FLFL_SQNO , '본인 실명번호와 별도 실제소유자 실명번호 동일' , SYSDATE , 'N'
FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_DTLD A LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_REL_OWNR_IFMN B ON B.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID AND B.CDD_FLFL_SQNO = A.CDD_FLFL_SQNO AND B.REL_OWNR_SQNO = 1
WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.DEL_YN <> 'Y' AND TRIM(A.CDD_FLFL_DATE) IS NOT NULL AND A.CLNT_RISK_RTNG_CODE IN ('H', 'M', 'L') AND A.PRCE_CHNL_SECT_CODE LIKE 'A%' AND A.CDD_FLFL_DATE = #{yyyymmdd}
AND A.CDD_CMPL_YN = 'Y' AND A.CDD_CLNT_SECT_CODE = '1' -- 개인
AND A.REL_OWNR_YN = 'N' AND TRIM(B.REL_OWNR_CLNT_NO_CRYP) IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(B.REL_OWNR_CLNT_NO_CRYP) = TRIM(A.CDD_TAGT_CLNT_NO_CRYP)

INSERT INTO SSQ.L_CDD_MNTN_DTLD ( MNTN_DATE , MNTN_STNR_CODE , CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID , CDD_FLFL_SQNO , MNTN_DTLS_CTNT , PRCE_DATE_TIME , ACTN_RSLT_SECT_CODE ) SELECT A.CDD_FLFL_DATE , 'CDD_134' , A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID , A.CDD_FLFL_SQNO , '실제소유자 정보누락' || CASE WHEN NVL(TRIM(B01.REL_OWNR_CNFM_MTHD_CODE), 'X') = 'X' AND NVL(TRIM(B02.REL_OWNR_CNFM_MTHD_CODE), 'X') = 'X' AND NVL(TRIM(B03.REL_OWNR_CNFM_MTHD_CODE), 'X') = 'X' AND NVL(TRIM(B04.REL_OWNR_CNFM_MTHD_CODE), 'X') = 'X' AND NVL(TRIM(B05.REL_OWNR_CNFM_MTHD_CODE), 'X') = 'X' AND NVL(TRIM(B06.REL_OWNR_CNFM_MTHD_CODE), 'X') = 'X' AND NVL(TRIM(B07.REL_OWNR_CNFM_MTHD_CODE), 'X') = 'X' AND NVL(TRIM(B08.REL_OWNR_CNFM_MTHD_CODE), 'X') = 'X' AND NVL(TRIM(B09.REL_OWNR_CNFM_MTHD_CODE), 'X') = 'X' AND NVL(TRIM(B10.REL_OWNR_CNFM_MTHD_CODE), 'X') = 'X' THEN ';확인단계 미입력' END ||
CASE WHEN B01.REL_OWNR_CNFM_MTHD_CODE IN ('1','2','3','4','5') AND (TRIM(B01.REL_OWNR_NAME) IS NULL OR B01.REL_OWNR_NTNY_ID = 0 OR TRIM(B01.REL_OWNR_BRDT) IS NULL) THEN ';실제소유자01(성명/소속국적/생년월일)' END || CASE WHEN B02.REL_OWNR_CNFM_MTHD_CODE IN ('1','2','3','4','5') AND (TRIM(B02.REL_OWNR_NAME) IS NULL OR B02.REL_OWNR_NTNY_ID = 0 OR TRIM(B02.REL_OWNR_BRDT) IS NULL) THEN ';실제소유자02(성명/소속국적/생년월일)' END || CASE WHEN B03.REL_OWNR_CNFM_MTHD_CODE IN ('1','2','3','4','5') AND (TRIM(B03.REL_OWNR_NAME) IS NULL OR B03.REL_OWNR_NTNY_ID = 0 OR TRIM(B03.REL_OWNR_BRDT) IS NULL) THEN ';실제소유자03(성명/소속국적/생년월일)' END || CASE WHEN B04.REL_OWNR_CNFM_MTHD_CODE IN ('1','2','3','4','5') AND (TRIM(B04.REL_OWNR_NAME) IS NULL OR B04.REL_OWNR_NTNY_ID = 0 OR TRIM(B04.REL_OWNR_BRDT) IS NULL) THEN ';실제소유자04(성명/소속국적/생년월일)' END || CASE WHEN B05.REL_OWNR_CNFM_MTHD_CODE IN ('1','2','3','4','5') AND (TRIM(B05.REL_OWNR_NAME) IS NULL OR B05.REL_OWNR_NTNY_ID = 0 OR TRIM(B05.REL_OWNR_BRDT) IS NULL) THEN ';실제소유자05(성명/소속국적/생년월일)' END || CASE WHEN B06.REL_OWNR_CNFM_MTHD_CODE IN ('1','2','3','4','5') AND (TRIM(B06.REL_OWNR_NAME) IS NULL OR B06.REL_OWNR_NTNY_ID = 0 OR TRIM(B06.REL_OWNR_BRDT) IS NULL) THEN ';실제소유자06(성명/소속국적/생년월일)' END || CASE WHEN B07.REL_OWNR_CNFM_MTHD_CODE IN ('1','2','3','4','5') AND (TRIM(B07.REL_OWNR_NAME) IS NULL OR B07.REL_OWNR_NTNY_ID = 0 OR TRIM(B07.REL_OWNR_BRDT) IS NULL) THEN ';실제소유자07(성명/소속국적/생년월일)' END || CASE WHEN B08.REL_OWNR_CNFM_MTHD_CODE IN ('1','2','3','4','5') AND (TRIM(B08.REL_OWNR_NAME) IS NULL OR B08.REL_OWNR_NTNY_ID = 0 OR TRIM(B08.REL_OWNR_BRDT) IS NULL) THEN ';실제소유자08(성명/소속국적/생년월일)' END || CASE WHEN B09.REL_OWNR_CNFM_MTHD_CODE IN ('1','2','3','4','5') AND (TRIM(B09.REL_OWNR_NAME) IS NULL OR B09.REL_OWNR_NTNY_ID = 0 OR TRIM(B09.REL_OWNR_BRDT) IS NULL) THEN ';실제소유자09(성명/소속국적/생년월일)' END || CASE WHEN B10.REL_OWNR_CNFM_MTHD_CODE IN ('1','2','3','4','5') AND (TRIM(B10.REL_OWNR_NAME) IS NULL OR B10.REL_OWNR_NTNY_ID = 0 OR TRIM(B10.REL_OWNR_BRDT) IS NULL) THEN ';실제소유자10(성명/소속국적/생년월일)' END
AS MNTN_DTLS_CTNT , SYSDATE , 'N'
FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_DTLD A
LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_REL_OWNR_IFMN B01 ON B01.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID AND B01.CDD_FLFL_SQNO = A.CDD_FLFL_SQNO AND B01.REL_OWNR_SQNO = 1 LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_REL_OWNR_IFMN B02 ON B02.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID AND B02.CDD_FLFL_SQNO = A.CDD_FLFL_SQNO AND B02.REL_OWNR_SQNO = 2 LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_REL_OWNR_IFMN B03 ON B03.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID AND B03.CDD_FLFL_SQNO = A.CDD_FLFL_SQNO AND B03.REL_OWNR_SQNO = 3 LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_REL_OWNR_IFMN B04 ON B04.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID AND B04.CDD_FLFL_SQNO = A.CDD_FLFL_SQNO AND B04.REL_OWNR_SQNO = 4 LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_REL_OWNR_IFMN B05 ON B05.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID AND B05.CDD_FLFL_SQNO = A.CDD_FLFL_SQNO AND B05.REL_OWNR_SQNO = 5 LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_REL_OWNR_IFMN B06 ON B06.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID AND B06.CDD_FLFL_SQNO = A.CDD_FLFL_SQNO AND B06.REL_OWNR_SQNO = 6 LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_REL_OWNR_IFMN B07 ON B07.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID AND B07.CDD_FLFL_SQNO = A.CDD_FLFL_SQNO AND B07.REL_OWNR_SQNO = 7 LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_REL_OWNR_IFMN B08 ON B08.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID AND B08.CDD_FLFL_SQNO = A.CDD_FLFL_SQNO AND B08.REL_OWNR_SQNO = 8 LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_REL_OWNR_IFMN B09 ON B09.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID AND B09.CDD_FLFL_SQNO = A.CDD_FLFL_SQNO AND B09.REL_OWNR_SQNO = 9 LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_REL_OWNR_IFMN B10 ON B10.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID AND B10.CDD_FLFL_SQNO = A.CDD_FLFL_SQNO AND B10.REL_OWNR_SQNO = 10
WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.DEL_YN <> 'Y' AND TRIM(A.CDD_FLFL_DATE) IS NOT NULL AND A.CLNT_RISK_RTNG_CODE IN ('H', 'M', 'L') AND A.PRCE_CHNL_SECT_CODE LIKE 'A%' AND A.CDD_FLFL_DATE = #{yyyymmdd}
AND A.CDD_CMPL_YN = 'Y' AND A.CDD_CLNT_SECT_CODE IN ('2', '3') -- 법인
AND A.REL_OWNR_YN = 'N'
AND ((NVL(TRIM(B01.REL_OWNR_CNFM_MTHD_CODE), 'X') = 'X' AND NVL(TRIM(B02.REL_OWNR_CNFM_MTHD_CODE), 'X') = 'X' AND NVL(TRIM(B03.REL_OWNR_CNFM_MTHD_CODE), 'X') = 'X' AND NVL(TRIM(B04.REL_OWNR_CNFM_MTHD_CODE), 'X') = 'X' AND NVL(TRIM(B05.REL_OWNR_CNFM_MTHD_CODE), 'X') = 'X' AND NVL(TRIM(B06.REL_OWNR_CNFM_MTHD_CODE), 'X') = 'X' AND NVL(TRIM(B07.REL_OWNR_CNFM_MTHD_CODE), 'X') = 'X' AND NVL(TRIM(B08.REL_OWNR_CNFM_MTHD_CODE), 'X') = 'X' AND NVL(TRIM(B09.REL_OWNR_CNFM_MTHD_CODE), 'X') = 'X' AND NVL(TRIM(B10.REL_OWNR_CNFM_MTHD_CODE), 'X') = 'X')
OR (B01.REL_OWNR_CNFM_MTHD_CODE IN ('1','2','3','4','5') AND (TRIM(B01.REL_OWNR_NAME) IS NULL OR B01.REL_OWNR_NTNY_ID = 0 OR TRIM(B01.REL_OWNR_BRDT) IS NULL)) OR (B02.REL_OWNR_CNFM_MTHD_CODE IN ('1','2','3','4','5') AND (TRIM(B02.REL_OWNR_NAME) IS NULL OR B02.REL_OWNR_NTNY_ID = 0 OR TRIM(B02.REL_OWNR_BRDT) IS NULL)) OR (B03.REL_OWNR_CNFM_MTHD_CODE IN ('1','2','3','4','5') AND (TRIM(B03.REL_OWNR_NAME) IS NULL OR B03.REL_OWNR_NTNY_ID = 0 OR TRIM(B03.REL_OWNR_BRDT) IS NULL)) OR (B04.REL_OWNR_CNFM_MTHD_CODE IN ('1','2','3','4','5') AND (TRIM(B04.REL_OWNR_NAME) IS NULL OR B04.REL_OWNR_NTNY_ID = 0 OR TRIM(B04.REL_OWNR_BRDT) IS NULL)) OR (B05.REL_OWNR_CNFM_MTHD_CODE IN ('1','2','3','4','5') AND (TRIM(B05.REL_OWNR_NAME) IS NULL OR B05.REL_OWNR_NTNY_ID = 0 OR TRIM(B05.REL_OWNR_BRDT) IS NULL)) OR (B06.REL_OWNR_CNFM_MTHD_CODE IN ('1','2','3','4','5') AND (TRIM(B06.REL_OWNR_NAME) IS NULL OR B06.REL_OWNR_NTNY_ID = 0 OR TRIM(B06.REL_OWNR_BRDT) IS NULL)) OR (B07.REL_OWNR_CNFM_MTHD_CODE IN ('1','2','3','4','5') AND (TRIM(B07.REL_OWNR_NAME) IS NULL OR B07.REL_OWNR_NTNY_ID = 0 OR TRIM(B07.REL_OWNR_BRDT) IS NULL)) OR (B08.REL_OWNR_CNFM_MTHD_CODE IN ('1','2','3','4','5') AND (TRIM(B08.REL_OWNR_NAME) IS NULL OR B08.REL_OWNR_NTNY_ID = 0 OR TRIM(B08.REL_OWNR_BRDT) IS NULL)) OR (B09.REL_OWNR_CNFM_MTHD_CODE IN ('1','2','3','4','5') AND (TRIM(B09.REL_OWNR_NAME) IS NULL OR B09.REL_OWNR_NTNY_ID = 0 OR TRIM(B09.REL_OWNR_BRDT) IS NULL)) OR (B10.REL_OWNR_CNFM_MTHD_CODE IN ('1','2','3','4','5') AND (TRIM(B10.REL_OWNR_NAME) IS NULL OR B10.REL_OWNR_NTNY_ID = 0 OR TRIM(B10.REL_OWNR_BRDT) IS NULL)))

INSERT INTO SSQ.L_CDD_MNTN_DTLD ( MNTN_DATE , MNTN_STNR_CODE , CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID , CDD_FLFL_SQNO , MNTN_DTLS_CTNT , PRCE_DATE_TIME , ACTN_RSLT_SECT_CODE ) SELECT A.CDD_FLFL_DATE , 'CDD_135' , A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID , A.CDD_FLFL_SQNO , '실제소유자 확인 생략사유 미입력' , SYSDATE , 'N'
FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_DTLD A
WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.DEL_YN <> 'Y' AND TRIM(A.CDD_FLFL_DATE) IS NOT NULL AND A.CLNT_RISK_RTNG_CODE IN ('H', 'M', 'L') AND A.PRCE_CHNL_SECT_CODE LIKE 'A%' AND A.CDD_FLFL_DATE = #{yyyymmdd}
AND A.CDD_CMPL_YN = 'Y' AND A.CDD_CLNT_SECT_CODE IN ('2', '3') -- 법인
AND A.REL_OWNR_YN = 'Y' AND TRIM(A.REL_OWNR_CNFM_EXCP_TAGT_CODE ) IS NULL

INSERT INTO SSQ.L_CDD_MNTN_DTLD ( MNTN_DATE , MNTN_STNR_CODE , CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID , CDD_FLFL_SQNO , MNTN_DTLS_CTNT , PRCE_DATE_TIME , ACTN_RSLT_SECT_CODE ) SELECT CDD_FLFL_DATE , 'CDD_136' , CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID , CDD_FLFL_SQNO , '같은 숫자로만 구성된 연락처' , SYSDATE , 'N' FROM (SELECT a.CDD_FLFL_DATE , a.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID , a.CDD_FLFL_SQNO FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_DTLD A , SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_CNTT_ADDR_IF B , SID.IDO_A_UUE_PHONE C WHERE a.CDD_FLFL_DATE = #{yyyymmdd} AND a.cdd_tagt_enty_id = b.cdd_tagt_enty_id AND CDD_CNTT_ADDR_SECT_CODE = 'TEL' AND b.CNTT_ADDR_ID = c.CNTT_ADDR_ID(+) AND c.PHON_NO_CRYP IN ( 'Pj+nQdI2eq0j+Z+VDDvVZQ==' /* 1111 */ , 'bNS0U4fqoor5YEfmyoPlZw==' /* 2222 */ , 'R0t5ea0pkuV4QIqq2+oqDg==' /* 3333 */ , 'RdvkOOLkioP/vukn9NwBTw==' /* 4444 */ , 'LrbX7l+ivpWenBaJjIlh4g==' /* 5555 */ , 'YMYNuLjqfQi7LjQVgAV7LQ==' /* 6666 */ , 'S2fQxA2AKL9V5XR+eu4/cw==' /* 7777 */ , '7p4vJLHxJy3qseFKbKD61A==' /* 8888 */ , 'A1iqcvratOTldsxGopMamg==' /* 9999 */ , 'pbxlHfNoIqmootYVo11MYw==' /* 0000 */ , 'gHajhP2y4y5PXs1rZNijsw==' /* 1000 */ , 'UTlri7Ek29czuN0BmcwClg==' /* 0001 */ ) UNION ALL SELECT a.CDD_FLFL_DATE , a.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID , a.CDD_FLFL_SQNO FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_DTLD A , SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_CNTT_ADDR_IF B , SID.IDO_A_UUE_MOBILE C WHERE a.CDD_FLFL_DATE = #{yyyymmdd} AND a.cdd_tagt_enty_id = b.cdd_tagt_enty_id AND CDD_CNTT_ADDR_SECT_CODE = 'MOB' AND b.CNTT_ADDR_ID = c.CNTT_ADDR_ID(+) AND ( (c.MOBL_PHON_ECNO_CRYP IN ('Pj+nQdI2eq0j+Z+VDDvVZQ==' /* 1111 */ , 'bNS0U4fqoor5YEfmyoPlZw==' /* 2222 */ , 'R0t5ea0pkuV4QIqq2+oqDg==' /* 3333 */ , 'RdvkOOLkioP/vukn9NwBTw==' /* 4444 */ , 'LrbX7l+ivpWenBaJjIlh4g==' /* 5555 */ , 'YMYNuLjqfQi7LjQVgAV7LQ==' /* 6666 */ , 'S2fQxA2AKL9V5XR+eu4/cw==' /* 7777 */ , '7p4vJLHxJy3qseFKbKD61A==' /* 8888 */ , 'A1iqcvratOTldsxGopMamg==' /* 9999 */ , 'pbxlHfNoIqmootYVo11MYw==' /* 0000 */ , 'gHajhP2y4y5PXs1rZNijsw==' /* 1000 */ , 'UTlri7Ek29czuN0BmcwClg==' /* 0001 */ ) ) OR (c.MOBL_PHON_NO_CRYP IN ('Pj+nQdI2eq0j+Z+VDDvVZQ==' /* 1111 */ , 'bNS0U4fqoor5YEfmyoPlZw==' /* 2222 */ , 'R0t5ea0pkuV4QIqq2+oqDg==' /* 3333 */ , 'RdvkOOLkioP/vukn9NwBTw==' /* 4444 */ , 'LrbX7l+ivpWenBaJjIlh4g==' /* 5555 */ , 'YMYNuLjqfQi7LjQVgAV7LQ==' /* 6666 */ , 'S2fQxA2AKL9V5XR+eu4/cw==' /* 7777 */ , '7p4vJLHxJy3qseFKbKD61A==' /* 8888 */ , 'A1iqcvratOTldsxGopMamg==' /* 9999 */ , 'pbxlHfNoIqmootYVo11MYw==' /* 0000 */ , 'gHajhP2y4y5PXs1rZNijsw==' /* 1000 */ , 'UTlri7Ek29czuN0BmcwClg==' /* 0001 */ ) ) ) ) a

INSERT INTO SSQ.L_CDD_MNTN_DTLD ( MNTN_DATE , MNTN_STNR_CODE , CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID , CDD_FLFL_SQNO , MNTN_DTLS_CTNT , PRCE_DATE_TIME , ACTN_RSLT_SECT_CODE ) SELECT a.CDD_FLFL_DATE , 'CDD_137' , a.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID , a.CDD_FLFL_SQNO , '현재 유효하지 않은 연락처' , SYSDATE , 'N' FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_DTLD A , SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_CNTT_ADDR_IF B , SID.IDO_A_UUE_MOBILE C WHERE a.CDD_FLFL_DATE = #{yyyymmdd} AND a.cdd_tagt_enty_id = b.cdd_tagt_enty_id AND CDD_CNTT_ADDR_SECT_CODE = 'MOB' AND b.CNTT_ADDR_ID = c.CNTT_ADDR_ID(+) AND (c.MOBL_PHON_IDNF_NO_CRYP IN ('xraRrgGVHSDW1mpORDWEZg==' /* 011 */ , '7c2fcSpgRDUU0pBZPMtW6g==' /* 016 */ , '0mrMDKwvAkx453o8JADMRQ==' /* 017 */ , 'cs+m4Wd7QgbXTjBxarfWbw==' /* 018 */ , 'IckDg0A2ue5ExCW1PxDjMg==' /* 019 */ ) )

INSERT INTO SSQ.L_CDD_MNTN_DTLD ( MNTN_DATE , MNTN_STNR_CODE , CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID , CDD_FLFL_SQNO , MNTN_DTLS_CTNT , PRCE_DATE_TIME , ACTN_RSLT_SECT_CODE ) SELECT a.CDD_FLFL_DATE , 'CDD_138' , a.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID , a.CDD_FLFL_SQNO , '실제소유자명이 4글자 이상인 경우 - 소유자명 : ' || b.REL_OWNR_NAME , SYSDATE , 'N' FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_DTLD A , SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_REL_OWNR_IFMN B WHERE a.CDD_FLFL_DATE = #{yyyymmdd} AND A.CDD_CLNT_SECT_CODE <> '1' -- 1개인 2,3법인 AND A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = b.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID AND A.CDD_FLFL_SQNO = B.CDD_FLFL_SQNO AND ( ( B.REL_OWNR_NTNY_ID = '1000000001' AND LENGTHB(REGEXP_REPLACE(REL_OWNR_NAME, '[^가-힝]')) > 6 ) /* 한글이 4글자 이상 */ OR ( TRIM(REL_OWNR_NAME) LIKE '%(주)%' ) /* '(주)' 포함 */ OR ( TRIM(REL_OWNR_NAME) LIKE '%,%' ) /* , 포함 */ OR ( TRIM(REL_OWNR_NAME) LIKE '%.%' ) /* . 포함 */ OR ( TRIM(REL_OWNR_NAME) LIKE '%-%' ) /* - 포함 */ OR ( TRIM(REL_OWNR_NAME) LIKE '%&%' ) /* & 포함 */ OR ( TRIM(REL_OWNR_NAME) LIKE '%㈜%' ) /* ㈜ 포함 */ OR ( TRIM(REL_OWNR_NAME) LIKE '%#_%' ESCAPE '#' ) /* _ 포함 */ )

INSERT INTO SSQ.L_CDD_MNTN_DTLD ( MNTN_DATE , MNTN_STNR_CODE , CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID , CDD_FLFL_SQNO , MNTN_DTLS_CTNT , PRCE_DATE_TIME , ACTN_RSLT_SECT_CODE ) SELECT a.CDD_FLFL_DATE , 'CDD_140' , a.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID , a.CDD_FLFL_SQNO , '대표자명이 4글자 이상인 경우 - 대표자명 : ' || A.RPST_1_NAME , SYSDATE , 'N' FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_DTLD A WHERE A.CDD_FLFL_DATE = #{yyyymmdd} AND A.CDD_CLNT_SECT_CODE <> '1' -- 1개인 2,3법인 AND ( ( A.RPST_1_NTNY_ID = '1000000001' AND LENGTHB(REGEXP_REPLACE(RPST_1_NAME, '[^가-힝]')) > 6 ) /* 한글이 4글자 이상 */ OR REGEXP_LIKE(TRIM(A.RPST_1_NAME), '[㈜,._&-]') OR ( TRIM(RPST_1_NAME) LIKE '%(주)%' ) /* '(주)' 포함 */ )

INSERT INTO SSQ.L_CDD_MNTN_DTLD ( MNTN_DATE , MNTN_STNR_CODE , CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID , CDD_FLFL_SQNO , MNTN_DTLS_CTNT , PRCE_DATE_TIME , ACTN_RSLT_SECT_CODE ) SELECT A.CDD_FLFL_DATE , 'CDD_190' , A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID , A.CDD_FLFL_SQNO , '코드값오류' || CASE WHEN NVL(T_01.CMN_CDVL, 'X') = 'X' THEN ';대상자구분(06755)[' || TRIM(A.CDD_TAGT_SECT_CODE) || ']' END || CASE WHEN NVL(T_02.CMN_CDVL, 'X') = 'X' THEN ';고객구분(06756)[' || TRIM(A.CDD_CLNT_SECT_CODE) || ']' END || CASE WHEN NVL(T_03.CMN_CDVL, 'X') = 'X' THEN ';(고객)실명번호구분(04232)[' || TRIM(A.TAGT_ENTY_ALIS_TYPE_CODE) || ']' END || CASE WHEN NVL(T_04.CMN_CDVL, 'X') = 'X' THEN ';(원천)실명번호구분(04232)[' || TRIM(A.ORIG_ENTY_ALIS_TYPE_CODE) || ']' END || CASE WHEN TRIM(A.CDD_TAGT_SECT_CODE) = '02' AND NVL(T_05.CMN_CDVL, 'X') = 'X' THEN ';대리인관계(06747)[' || TRIM(A.CDD_AGNT_RLTP_SECT_CODE) || ']' END || CASE WHEN TRIM(A.CDD_TAGT_SECT_CODE) = '02' AND NVL(T_06.CMN_CDVL, 'X') = 'X' THEN ';대리인위임서류(06770)[' || TRIM(A.CDD_AGNT_ENTS_DOC_CODE) || ']' END ||
CASE WHEN NVL(T_07.CMN_CDVL, 'X') = 'X' THEN ';등록사유(06757)[' || TRIM(A.CDD_RGSN_RESN_CODE) || ']' END || CASE WHEN (TRIM(A.RLNM_CNFM_TKN_CODE) IS NOT NULL AND NVL(T_08.CMN_CDVL, 'X') = 'X') THEN ';실명확인증표(06758)[' || TRIM(A.RLNM_CNFM_TKN_CODE) || ']' END || CASE WHEN (TRIM(A.RLNM_CNFM_VRFT_MTHD_CODE) IS NOT NULL AND NVL(T_09.CMN_CDVL, 'X') = 'X') THEN ';실명확인검증방법(06750)[' || TRIM(A.RLNM_CNFM_VRFT_MTHD_CODE) || ']' END || CASE WHEN (A.CDD_CLNT_SECT_CODE = '1' AND NVL(T_10.CMN_CDVL, 'X') = 'X') THEN ';성별(00723)[' || TRIM(A.GNDR_SECT_CODE) || ']' END || CASE WHEN (A.CDD_CLNT_SECT_CODE = '1' AND NVL(T_11.CMN_CDVL, 'X') = 'X') THEN ';직업(01437)[' || TRIM(A.JOB_CODE) || ']' END || CASE WHEN (A.CDD_CLNT_SECT_CODE = '3' AND NVL(T_12.CMN_CDVL, 'X') = 'X') THEN ';설립목적(06751)[' || TRIM(A.ESTT_PRPS_CODE) || ']' END || CASE WHEN (A.CDD_CLNT_SECT_CODE = '3' AND TRIM(A.ESTT_PRPS_VRFT_MTHD_CODE) IS NOT NULL AND NVL(T_13.CMN_CDVL, 'X') = 'X') THEN ';설립목적검증서류(06752)[' || TRIM(A.ESTT_PRPS_VRFT_MTHD_CODE) || ']' END || CASE WHEN (A.CDD_CLNT_SECT_CODE = '2' AND NVL(T_14.STND_INDY_CLSN_CODE, 'X') = 'X') THEN ';업종[' || TRIM(A.STND_INDY_CLSN_CODE) || ']' END || CASE WHEN (A.CDD_CLNT_SECT_CODE IN ('2', '3') AND TRIM(A.REL_OWNR_CNFM_EXCP_TAGT_CODE) IS NOT NULL AND NVL(T_15.CMN_CDVL, 'X') = 'X') THEN ';실제소유자확인생략사유(06753)[' || TRIM(A.REL_OWNR_CNFM_EXCP_TAGT_CODE) || ']' END || CASE WHEN (TRIM(A.CRFL_FLTG_RSLT_CODE) IS NOT NULL AND NVL(T_16.CMN_CDVL, 'X') = 'X') THEN ';요주의필터링결과(06719)[' || TRIM(A.CRFL_FLTG_RSLT_CODE) || ']' END || CASE WHEN (TRIM(A.CRFL_FLTG_NSPN_RSLT_CODE) IS NOT NULL AND NVL(T_17.CMN_CDVL, 'X') = 'X') THEN ';요주의필터링점검결과(06720)[' || TRIM(A.CRFL_FLTG_NSPN_RSLT_CODE) || ']' END || --CASE WHEN NVL(T_18.CHNL_SECT_CODE, 'X') = 'X' THEN ';채널구분[' || TRIM(A.CHNL_SECT_CODE) || ']' END || CASE WHEN NVL(T_19.CHNL_SECT_CODE, 'X') = 'X' THEN ';처리채널구분[' || TRIM(A.PRCE_CHNL_SECT_CODE) || ']' END || CASE WHEN (SUBSTR(A.PRCE_CHNL_SECT_CODE, 1, 1) = 'A' AND NVL(T_20.DTBR_CODE, 'X') = 'X') THEN ';등록지점[' || TRIM(A.RGBR_CODE) || ']' END ||
CASE WHEN A.EDD_TAGT_YN = 'Y' AND A.CDD_CLNT_SECT_CODE = '1' AND NVL(T_21.CMN_CDVL, 'X') = 'X' THEN ';개인거래목적(06738)[' || TRIM(E.NDVL_TRDG_PRPS_CODE) || ']' END || CASE WHEN A.EDD_TAGT_YN = 'Y' AND A.CDD_CLNT_SECT_CODE = '1' AND NVL(T_22.CMN_CDVL, 'X') = 'X' THEN ';개인자금원천(06740)[' || TRIM(E.NDVL_FUNS_ORIG_CODE) || ']' END || CASE WHEN A.EDD_TAGT_YN = 'Y' AND A.CDD_CLNT_SECT_CODE = '1' AND TRIM(E.ASMT_FNC_ASST_STN_CODE) IS NOT NULL AND NVL(T_23.CMN_CDVL, 'X') = 'X' THEN ';추정금융자산현황(06742)[' || TRIM(E.ASMT_FNC_ASST_STN_CODE) || ']' END || CASE WHEN A.EDD_TAGT_YN = 'Y' AND A.CDD_CLNT_SECT_CODE = '1' AND TRIM(E.NDVL_FRCT_TRDG_CNT_CODE) IS NOT NULL AND NVL(T_24.CMN_CDVL, 'X') = 'X' THEN ';개인예상거래횟수(06744)[' || TRIM(E.NDVL_FRCT_TRDG_CNT_CODE) || ']' END || CASE WHEN A.EDD_TAGT_YN = 'Y' AND A.CDD_CLNT_SECT_CODE = '1' AND TRIM(E.NDVL_FRCT_TRDG_SCL_CODE) IS NOT NULL AND NVL(T_25.CMN_CDVL, 'X') = 'X' THEN ';개인예상거래규모(06742)[' || TRIM(E.NDVL_FRCT_TRDG_SCL_CODE) || ']' END || CASE WHEN A.EDD_TAGT_YN = 'Y' AND A.CDD_CLNT_SECT_CODE = '1' AND TRIM(E.ASMT_RLES_SCL_CODE) IS NOT NULL AND NVL(T_26.CMN_CDVL, 'X') = 'X' THEN ';추정부동산규모(06743)[' || TRIM(E.ASMT_RLES_SCL_CODE) || ']' END || CASE WHEN A.EDD_TAGT_YN = 'Y' AND A.CDD_CLNT_SECT_CODE = '1' AND TRIM(E.ASMT_MVAS_SCL_CODE) IS NOT NULL AND NVL(T_27.CMN_CDVL, 'X') = 'X' THEN ';추정동산규모(06743)[' || TRIM(E.ASMT_MVAS_SCL_CODE) || ']' END || CASE WHEN A.EDD_TAGT_YN = 'Y' AND A.CDD_CLNT_SECT_CODE = '1' AND TRIM(E.ASMT_LBLT_SCL_CODE) IS NOT NULL AND NVL(T_28.CMN_CDVL, 'X') = 'X' THEN ';추정부채규모(06743)[' || TRIM(E.ASMT_LBLT_SCL_CODE) || ']' END || CASE WHEN A.EDD_TAGT_YN = 'Y' AND A.CDD_CLNT_SECT_CODE = '1' AND TRIM(E.YEAR_INCM_SCL_CODE) IS NOT NULL AND NVL(T_29.CMN_CDVL, 'X') = 'X' THEN ';년소득규모(06742)[' || TRIM(E.YEAR_INCM_SCL_CODE) || ']' END ||
CASE WHEN A.EDD_TAGT_YN = 'Y' AND A.CDD_CLNT_SECT_CODE IN ('2', '3') AND NVL(T_30.CMN_CDVL, 'X') = 'X' THEN ';법인거래목적(06739)[' || TRIM(E.INSN_TRDG_PRPS_CODE) || ']' END || CASE WHEN A.EDD_TAGT_YN = 'Y' AND A.CDD_CLNT_SECT_CODE IN ('2', '3') AND NVL(T_31.CMN_CDVL, 'X') = 'X' THEN ';법인자금원천(06741)[' || TRIM(E.INSN_FUNS_ORIG_CODE) || ']' END || CASE WHEN A.EDD_TAGT_YN = 'Y' AND A.CDD_CLNT_SECT_CODE IN ('2', '3') AND TRIM(E.INSN_FRCT_TRDG_CNT_CODE) IS NOT NULL AND NVL(T_32.CMN_CDVL, 'X') = 'X' THEN ';법인예상거래횟수(06744)[' || TRIM(E.INSN_FRCT_TRDG_CNT_CODE) || ']' END || CASE WHEN A.EDD_TAGT_YN = 'Y' AND A.CDD_CLNT_SECT_CODE IN ('2', '3') AND TRIM(E.INSN_FRCT_TRDG_SCL_CODE) IS NOT NULL AND NVL(T_33.CMN_CDVL, 'X') = 'X' THEN ';법인예상거래규모(06742)[' || TRIM(E.INSN_FRCT_TRDG_SCL_CODE) || ']' END || CASE WHEN A.EDD_TAGT_YN = 'Y' AND A.CDD_CLNT_SECT_CODE IN ('2', '3') AND TRIM(E.INSN_SCL_SECT_CODE) IS NOT NULL AND NVL(T_34.CMN_CDVL, 'X') = 'X' THEN ';법인규모구분(06745)[' || TRIM(E.INSN_SCL_SECT_CODE) || ']' END || CASE WHEN A.EDD_TAGT_YN = 'Y' AND A.CDD_CLNT_SECT_CODE IN ('2', '3') AND TRIM(E.INSN_LSTG_MRKT_CODE) IS NOT NULL AND NVL(T_35.CMN_CDVL, 'X') = 'X' THEN ';법인상장시장(06746)[' || TRIM(E.INSN_LSTG_MRKT_CODE) || ']' END
AS MNTN_DTLS_CTNT , SYSDATE , 'N'
FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_DTLD A LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_MAH_EDD_FLFL_DTLD E ON E.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID AND E.CDD_FLFL_SQNO = A.CDD_FLFL_SQNO
LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UWB_COM_CD_DTL T_01 -- CDD_TAGT_SECT_CODE;대상자구분 ON T_01.DEL_YN = 'N' AND T_01.USE_YN = 'Y' AND T_01.CMN_CODE_ID = '06755' AND T_01.CMN_CDVL = A.CDD_TAGT_SECT_CODE LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UWB_COM_CD_DTL T_02 -- CDD_CLNT_SECT_CODE;고객구분 ON T_02.DEL_YN = 'N' AND T_02.USE_YN = 'Y' AND T_02.CMN_CODE_ID = '06756' AND T_02.CMN_CDVL = A.CDD_CLNT_SECT_CODE LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UWB_COM_CD_DTL T_03 -- TAGT_ENTY_ALIS_TYPE_CODE;(고객)실명번호구분 ON T_03.DEL_YN = 'N' AND T_03.USE_YN = 'Y' AND T_03.CMN_CODE_ID = '04232' AND T_03.CMN_CDVL = A.TAGT_ENTY_ALIS_TYPE_CODE LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UWB_COM_CD_DTL T_04 -- ORIG_ENTY_ALIS_TYPE_CODE;(원천)실명번호구분 ON T_04.DEL_YN = 'N' AND T_04.USE_YN = 'Y' AND T_04.CMN_CODE_ID = '04232' AND T_04.CMN_CDVL = A.ORIG_ENTY_ALIS_TYPE_CODE LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UWB_COM_CD_DTL T_05 -- CDD_AGNT_RLTP_SECT_CODE;대리인관계 ON T_05.DEL_YN = 'N' AND T_05.USE_YN = 'Y' AND T_05.CMN_CODE_ID = '06747' AND T_05.CMN_CDVL = A.CDD_AGNT_RLTP_SECT_CODE LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UWB_COM_CD_DTL T_06 -- CDD_AGNT_ENTS_DOC_CODE;대리인위임서류 ON T_06.DEL_YN = 'N' AND T_06.USE_YN = 'Y' AND T_06.CMN_CODE_ID = '06770' AND T_06.CMN_CDVL = A.CDD_AGNT_ENTS_DOC_CODE LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UWB_COM_CD_DTL T_07 -- CDD_RGSN_RESN_CODE;등록사유 ON T_07.DEL_YN = 'N' AND T_07.USE_YN = 'Y' AND T_07.CMN_CODE_ID = '06757' AND T_07.CMN_CDVL = A.CDD_RGSN_RESN_CODE LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UWB_COM_CD_DTL T_08 -- RLNM_CNFM_TKN_CODE;실명확인증표 ON T_08.DEL_YN = 'N' AND T_08.USE_YN = 'Y' AND T_08.CMN_CODE_ID = '06758' AND T_08.CMN_CDVL = A.RLNM_CNFM_TKN_CODE LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UWB_COM_CD_DTL T_09 -- RLNM_CNFM_VRFT_MTHD_CODE;실명확인검증방법 ON T_09.DEL_YN = 'N' AND T_09.USE_YN = 'Y' AND T_09.CMN_CODE_ID = '06750' AND T_09.CMN_CDVL = A.RLNM_CNFM_VRFT_MTHD_CODE LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UWB_COM_CD_DTL T_10 -- GNDR_SECT_CODE;성별 ON T_10.DEL_YN = 'N' AND T_10.USE_YN = 'Y' AND T_10.CMN_CODE_ID = '00723' AND T_10.CMN_CDVL = A.GNDR_SECT_CODE LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UWB_COM_CD_DTL T_11 -- JOB_CODE;직업 ON T_11.DEL_YN = 'N' AND T_11.USE_YN = 'Y' AND T_11.CMN_CODE_ID = '01437' AND T_11.CMN_CDVL = A.JOB_CODE LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UWB_COM_CD_DTL T_12 -- ESTT_PRPS_CODE;설립목적 ON T_12.DEL_YN = 'N' AND T_12.USE_YN = 'Y' AND T_12.CMN_CODE_ID = '06751' AND T_12.CMN_CDVL = A.ESTT_PRPS_CODE LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UWB_COM_CD_DTL T_13 -- ESTT_PRPS_VRFT_MTHD_CODE;설립목적검증서류 ON T_13.DEL_YN = 'N' AND T_13.USE_YN = 'Y' AND T_13.CMN_CODE_ID = '06752' AND T_13.CMN_CDVL = A.ESTT_PRPS_VRFT_MTHD_CODE LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUE_INDY_CLSN T_14 -- STND_INDY_CLSN_CODE;업종 ON T_14.INDY_CLSN_TYPE_CODE = 'KS' AND T_14.STND_INDY_CLSN_CODE = A.STND_INDY_CLSN_CODE LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UWB_COM_CD_DTL T_15 -- REL_OWNR_CNFM_EXCP_TAGT_CODE;실제소유자확인생략사유 ON T_15.DEL_YN = 'N' AND T_15.USE_YN = 'Y' AND T_15.CMN_CODE_ID = '06753' AND T_15.CMN_CDVL = A.REL_OWNR_CNFM_EXCP_TAGT_CODE LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UWB_COM_CD_DTL T_16 -- CRFL_FLTG_RSLT_CODE;요주의필터링결과 ON T_16.DEL_YN = 'N' AND T_16.USE_YN = 'Y' AND T_16.CMN_CODE_ID = '06719' AND T_16.CMN_CDVL = A.CRFL_FLTG_RSLT_CODE LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UWB_COM_CD_DTL T_17 -- CRFL_FLTG_NSPN_RSLT_CODE;요주의필터링점검결과 ON T_17.DEL_YN = 'N' AND T_17.USE_YN = 'Y' AND T_17.CMN_CODE_ID = '06720' AND T_17.CMN_CDVL = A.CRFL_FLTG_NSPN_RSLT_CODE -- LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UWB_CHANNEL_CD T_18 -- CHNL_SECT_CODE;채널구분 -- ON T_18.CHNL_SECT_CODE = A.CHNL_SECT_CODE LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UWB_CHANNEL_CD T_19 -- PRCE_CHNL_SECT_CODE;처리채널구분 ON T_19.CHNL_SECT_CODE = A.PRCE_CHNL_SECT_CODE LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUE_SAMSUNG_DPRT T_20 -- RGBR_CODE:등록지점 ON T_20.DTBR_CODE = A.RGBR_CODE LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UWB_COM_CD_DTL T_21 -- NDVL_TRDG_PRPS_CODE;개인거래목적코드 ON T_21.DEL_YN = 'N' AND T_21.USE_YN = 'Y' AND T_21.CMN_CODE_ID = '06738' AND T_21.CMN_CDVL = E.NDVL_TRDG_PRPS_CODE LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UWB_COM_CD_DTL T_22 -- NDVL_FUNS_ORIG_CODE;개인자금원천코드 ON T_22.DEL_YN = 'N' AND T_22.USE_YN = 'Y' AND T_22.CMN_CODE_ID = '06740' AND T_22.CMN_CDVL = E.NDVL_FUNS_ORIG_CODE LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UWB_COM_CD_DTL T_23 -- ASMT_FNC_ASST_STN_CODE;추정금융자산현황코드 ON T_23.DEL_YN = 'N' AND T_23.USE_YN = 'Y' AND T_23.CMN_CODE_ID = '06742' AND T_23.CMN_CDVL = E.ASMT_FNC_ASST_STN_CODE LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UWB_COM_CD_DTL T_24 -- NDVL_FRCT_TRDG_CNT_CODE;개인예상거래횟수코드 ON T_24.DEL_YN = 'N' AND T_24.USE_YN = 'Y' AND T_24.CMN_CODE_ID = '06744' AND T_24.CMN_CDVL = E.NDVL_FRCT_TRDG_CNT_CODE LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UWB_COM_CD_DTL T_25 -- NDVL_FRCT_TRDG_SCL_CODE;개인예상거래규모코드 ON T_25.DEL_YN = 'N' AND T_25.USE_YN = 'Y' AND T_25.CMN_CODE_ID = '06742' AND T_25.CMN_CDVL = E.NDVL_FRCT_TRDG_SCL_CODE LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UWB_COM_CD_DTL T_26 -- ASMT_RLES_SCL_CODE;추정부동산규모코드 ON T_26.DEL_YN = 'N' AND T_26.USE_YN = 'Y' AND T_26.CMN_CODE_ID = '06743' AND T_26.CMN_CDVL = E.ASMT_RLES_SCL_CODE LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UWB_COM_CD_DTL T_27 -- ASMT_MVAS_SCL_CODE;추정동산규모코드 ON T_27.DEL_YN = 'N' AND T_27.USE_YN = 'Y' AND T_27.CMN_CODE_ID = '06743' AND T_27.CMN_CDVL = E.ASMT_MVAS_SCL_CODE LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UWB_COM_CD_DTL T_28 -- ASMT_LBLT_SCL_CODE;추정부채규모코드 ON T_28.DEL_YN = 'N' AND T_28.USE_YN = 'Y' AND T_28.CMN_CODE_ID = '06743' AND T_28.CMN_CDVL = E.ASMT_LBLT_SCL_CODE LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UWB_COM_CD_DTL T_29 -- YEAR_INCM_SCL_CODE;년소득규모코드 ON T_29.DEL_YN = 'N' AND T_29.USE_YN = 'Y' AND T_29.CMN_CODE_ID = '06742' AND T_29.CMN_CDVL = E.YEAR_INCM_SCL_CODE LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UWB_COM_CD_DTL T_30 -- INSN_TRDG_PRPS_CODE;법인거래목적코드 ON T_30.DEL_YN = 'N' AND T_30.USE_YN = 'Y' AND T_30.CMN_CODE_ID = '06739' AND T_30.CMN_CDVL = E.INSN_TRDG_PRPS_CODE LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UWB_COM_CD_DTL T_31 -- INSN_FUNS_ORIG_CODE;법인자금원천코드 ON T_31.DEL_YN = 'N' AND T_31.USE_YN = 'Y' AND T_31.CMN_CODE_ID = '06741' AND T_31.CMN_CDVL = E.INSN_FUNS_ORIG_CODE LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UWB_COM_CD_DTL T_32 -- INSN_FRCT_TRDG_CNT_CODE;법인예상거래횟수코드 ON T_32.DEL_YN = 'N' AND T_32.USE_YN = 'Y' AND T_32.CMN_CODE_ID = '06744' AND T_32.CMN_CDVL = E.INSN_FRCT_TRDG_CNT_CODE LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UWB_COM_CD_DTL T_33 -- INSN_FRCT_TRDG_SCL_CODE;법인예상거래규모코드 ON T_33.DEL_YN = 'N' AND T_33.USE_YN = 'Y' AND T_33.CMN_CODE_ID = '06742' AND T_33.CMN_CDVL = E.INSN_FRCT_TRDG_SCL_CODE LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UWB_COM_CD_DTL T_34 -- INSN_SCL_SECT_CODE;법인규모구분코드 ON T_34.DEL_YN = 'N' AND T_34.USE_YN = 'Y' AND T_34.CMN_CODE_ID = '06745' AND T_34.CMN_CDVL = E.INSN_SCL_SECT_CODE LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UWB_COM_CD_DTL T_35 -- INSN_LSTG_MRKT_CODE;법인상장시장코드 ON T_35.DEL_YN = 'N' AND T_35.USE_YN = 'Y' AND T_35.CMN_CODE_ID = '06746' AND T_35.CMN_CDVL = E.INSN_LSTG_MRKT_CODE
WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.DEL_YN <> 'Y' AND TRIM(A.CDD_FLFL_DATE) IS NOT NULL AND A.CLNT_RISK_RTNG_CODE IN ('H', 'M', 'L') -- AND A.PRCE_CHNL_SECT_CODE LIKE 'A%' AND A.CDD_FLFL_DATE = #{yyyymmdd}
AND A.CDD_CMPL_YN = 'Y' -- AND A.CDD_CLNT_SECT_CODE IN ('1', '2', '3') -- 법인
AND (NVL(T_01.CMN_CDVL, 'X') = 'X' -- CDD_TAGT_SECT_CODE;대상자구분 OR NVL(T_02.CMN_CDVL, 'X') = 'X' -- CDD_CLNT_SECT_CODE;고객구분 OR NVL(T_03.CMN_CDVL, 'X') = 'X' -- TAGT_ENTY_ALIS_TYPE_CODE;(고객)실명번호구분 OR NVL(T_04.CMN_CDVL, 'X') = 'X' -- ORIG_ENTY_ALIS_TYPE_CODE;(원천)실명번호구분 OR (TRIM(A.CDD_TAGT_SECT_CODE) = '02' AND NVL(T_05.CMN_CDVL, 'X') = 'X') -- CDD_AGNT_RLTP_SECT_CODE;대리인관계 OR (TRIM(A.CDD_TAGT_SECT_CODE) = '02' AND NVL(T_06.CMN_CDVL, 'X') = 'X') -- CDD_AGNT_ENTS_DOC_CODE;대리인위임서류 OR NVL(T_07.CMN_CDVL, 'X') = 'X' -- CDD_RGSN_RESN_CODE;등록사유 OR (TRIM(A.RLNM_CNFM_TKN_CODE) IS NOT NULL AND NVL(T_08.CMN_CDVL, 'X') = 'X') -- RLNM_CNFM_TKN_CODE;실명확인증표 OR (TRIM(A.RLNM_CNFM_VRFT_MTHD_CODE) IS NOT NULL AND NVL(T_09.CMN_CDVL, 'X') = 'X') -- RLNM_CNFM_VRFT_MTHD_CODE;실명확인검증방법 OR (A.CDD_CLNT_SECT_CODE = '1' AND NVL(T_10.CMN_CDVL, 'X') = 'X') -- GNDR_SECT_CODE;성별 OR (A.CDD_CLNT_SECT_CODE = '1' AND NVL(T_11.CMN_CDVL, 'X') = 'X') -- JOB_CODE;직업 OR (A.CDD_CLNT_SECT_CODE = '3' AND NVL(T_12.CMN_CDVL, 'X') = 'X') -- ESTT_PRPS_CODE;설립목적 OR (A.CDD_CLNT_SECT_CODE = '3' AND TRIM(A.ESTT_PRPS_VRFT_MTHD_CODE) IS NOT NULL AND NVL(T_13.CMN_CDVL, 'X') = 'X') -- ESTT_PRPS_VRFT_MTHD_CODE;설립목적검증서류 OR (A.CDD_CLNT_SECT_CODE = '2' AND NVL(T_14.STND_INDY_CLSN_CODE, 'X') = 'X') -- STND_INDY_CLSN_CODE;업종 OR (A.CDD_CLNT_SECT_CODE IN ('2', '3') AND TRIM(A.REL_OWNR_CNFM_EXCP_TAGT_CODE) IS NOT NULL AND NVL(T_15.CMN_CDVL, 'X') = 'X') -- REL_OWNR_CNFM_EXCP_TAGT_CODE;실제소유자확인생략사유 OR (TRIM(A.CRFL_FLTG_RSLT_CODE) IS NOT NULL AND NVL(T_16.CMN_CDVL, 'X') = 'X') -- CRFL_FLTG_RSLT_CODE;요주의필터링결과 OR (TRIM(A.CRFL_FLTG_NSPN_RSLT_CODE) IS NOT NULL AND NVL(T_17.CMN_CDVL, 'X') = 'X') -- CRFL_FLTG_NSPN_RSLT_CODE;요주의필터링점검결과 -- OR NVL(T_18.CHNL_SECT_CODE, 'X') = 'X' -- CHNL_SECT_CODE;채널구분 OR NVL(T_19.CHNL_SECT_CODE, 'X') = 'X' -- PRCE_CHNL_SECT_CODE;처리채널구분 OR (SUBSTR(A.PRCE_CHNL_SECT_CODE, 1, 1) = 'A' AND NVL(T_20.DTBR_CODE, 'X') = 'X') -- RGBR_CODE;등록지점
OR A.EDD_TAGT_YN = 'Y' AND A.CDD_CLNT_SECT_CODE = '1' AND NVL(T_21.CMN_CDVL, 'X') = 'X' -- NDVL_TRDG_PRPS_CODE;개인거래목적 OR A.EDD_TAGT_YN = 'Y' AND A.CDD_CLNT_SECT_CODE = '1' AND NVL(T_22.CMN_CDVL, 'X') = 'X' -- NDVL_FUNS_ORIG_CODE;개인자금원천 OR A.EDD_TAGT_YN = 'Y' AND A.CDD_CLNT_SECT_CODE = '1' AND TRIM(E.ASMT_FNC_ASST_STN_CODE) IS NOT NULL AND NVL(T_23.CMN_CDVL, 'X') = 'X' -- ASMT_FNC_ASST_STN_CODE;추정금융자산현황 OR A.EDD_TAGT_YN = 'Y' AND A.CDD_CLNT_SECT_CODE = '1' AND TRIM(E.NDVL_FRCT_TRDG_CNT_CODE) IS NOT NULL AND NVL(T_24.CMN_CDVL, 'X') = 'X' -- NDVL_FRCT_TRDG_CNT_CODE;개인예상거래횟수 OR A.EDD_TAGT_YN = 'Y' AND A.CDD_CLNT_SECT_CODE = '1' AND TRIM(E.NDVL_FRCT_TRDG_SCL_CODE) IS NOT NULL AND NVL(T_25.CMN_CDVL, 'X') = 'X' -- NDVL_FRCT_TRDG_SCL_CODE;개인예상거래규모 OR A.EDD_TAGT_YN = 'Y' AND A.CDD_CLNT_SECT_CODE = '1' AND TRIM(E.ASMT_RLES_SCL_CODE) IS NOT NULL AND NVL(T_26.CMN_CDVL, 'X') = 'X' -- ASMT_RLES_SCL_CODE;추정부동산규모 OR A.EDD_TAGT_YN = 'Y' AND A.CDD_CLNT_SECT_CODE = '1' AND TRIM(E.ASMT_MVAS_SCL_CODE) IS NOT NULL AND NVL(T_27.CMN_CDVL, 'X') = 'X' -- ASMT_MVAS_SCL_CODE;추정동산규모 OR A.EDD_TAGT_YN = 'Y' AND A.CDD_CLNT_SECT_CODE = '1' AND TRIM(E.ASMT_LBLT_SCL_CODE) IS NOT NULL AND NVL(T_28.CMN_CDVL, 'X') = 'X' -- ASMT_LBLT_SCL_CODE;추정부채규모 OR A.EDD_TAGT_YN = 'Y' AND A.CDD_CLNT_SECT_CODE = '1' AND TRIM(E.YEAR_INCM_SCL_CODE) IS NOT NULL AND NVL(T_29.CMN_CDVL, 'X') = 'X' -- YEAR_INCM_SCL_CODE;년소득규모
OR A.EDD_TAGT_YN = 'Y' AND A.CDD_CLNT_SECT_CODE IN ('2', '3') AND NVL(T_30.CMN_CDVL, 'X') = 'X' -- INSN_TRDG_PRPS_CODE;법인거래목적 OR A.EDD_TAGT_YN = 'Y' AND A.CDD_CLNT_SECT_CODE IN ('2', '3') AND NVL(T_31.CMN_CDVL, 'X') = 'X' -- INSN_FUNS_ORIG_CODE;법인자금원천 OR A.EDD_TAGT_YN = 'Y' AND A.CDD_CLNT_SECT_CODE IN ('2', '3') AND TRIM(E.INSN_FRCT_TRDG_CNT_CODE) IS NOT NULL AND NVL(T_32.CMN_CDVL, 'X') = 'X' -- INSN_FRCT_TRDG_CNT_CODE;법인예상거래횟수 OR A.EDD_TAGT_YN = 'Y' AND A.CDD_CLNT_SECT_CODE IN ('2', '3') AND TRIM(E.INSN_FRCT_TRDG_SCL_CODE) IS NOT NULL AND NVL(T_33.CMN_CDVL, 'X') = 'X' -- INSN_FRCT_TRDG_SCL_CODE;법인예상거래규모 OR A.EDD_TAGT_YN = 'Y' AND A.CDD_CLNT_SECT_CODE IN ('2', '3') AND TRIM(E.INSN_SCL_SECT_CODE) IS NOT NULL AND NVL(T_34.CMN_CDVL, 'X') = 'X' -- INSN_SCL_SECT_CODE;법인규모구분 OR A.EDD_TAGT_YN = 'Y' AND A.CDD_CLNT_SECT_CODE IN ('2', '3') AND TRIM(E.INSN_LSTG_MRKT_CODE) IS NOT NULL AND NVL(T_35.CMN_CDVL, 'X') = 'X' -- INSN_LSTG_MRKT_CODE;법인상장시장
)

INSERT INTO SSQ.L_CDD_MNTN_DTLD ( MNTN_DATE , MNTN_STNR_CODE , CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID , CDD_FLFL_SQNO , MNTN_DTLS_CTNT , PRCE_DATE_TIME , ACTN_RSLT_SECT_CODE ) SELECT A.CDD_FLFL_DATE , 'CDD_202' , A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID , A.CDD_FLFL_SQNO , '당사자구분 : 본인, 거래목적 : ' || CASE WHEN A.CDD_CLNT_SECT_CODE = '1' THEN B.NDVL_TRDG_PRPS_CODE || '.' || NVL((SELECT CMN_CDVL_NAME FROM SID.IDO_A_UWB_COM_CD_DTL WHERE CMN_CODE_ID = '06738' AND CMN_CDVL = B.NDVL_TRDG_PRPS_CODE), '') || ', 자금원천 : ' || B.NDVL_FUNS_ORIG_CODE || '.' || NVL((SELECT CMN_CDVL_NAME FROM SID.IDO_A_UWB_COM_CD_DTL WHERE CMN_CODE_ID = '06740' AND CMN_CDVL = B.NDVL_FUNS_ORIG_CODE), '') ELSE B.INSN_TRDG_PRPS_CODE || '.' || NVL((SELECT CMN_CDVL_NAME FROM SID.IDO_A_UWB_COM_CD_DTL WHERE CMN_CODE_ID = '06739' AND CMN_CDVL = B.INSN_TRDG_PRPS_CODE), '') || ', 자금원천 : ' || B.INSN_FUNS_ORIG_CODE || '.' || NVL((SELECT CMN_CDVL_NAME FROM SID.IDO_A_UWB_COM_CD_DTL WHERE CMN_CODE_ID = '06741' AND CMN_CDVL = B.INSN_FUNS_ORIG_CODE), '') END , SYSDATE , 'N'
FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_DTLD A INNER JOIN SID.IDO_A_MAH_EDD_FLFL_DTLD B ON A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = B.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID AND A.CDD_FLFL_SQNO = B.CDD_FLFL_SQNO WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.DEL_YN <> 'Y' AND TRIM(A.CDD_FLFL_DATE) IS NOT NULL AND A.CLNT_RISK_RTNG_CODE IN ('H', 'M', 'L') AND A.PRCE_CHNL_SECT_CODE LIKE 'A%' AND A.CDD_FLFL_DATE = #{yyyymmdd}
AND A.EDD_TAGT_YN = 'Y' AND A.CDD_TAGT_SECT_CODE = '01' -- 본인
AND ((A.CDD_CLNT_SECT_CODE = '1' -- 개인 AND B.NDVL_TRDG_PRPS_CODE = '07' -- 개인거래목적코드 : 07.대리인거래 AND B.NDVL_FUNS_ORIG_CODE = '09') -- 개인자금원천코드 : 09.대리인거래
OR (A.CDD_CLNT_SECT_CODE IN ('2', '3') -- 법인 AND B.INSN_TRDG_PRPS_CODE = '04' -- 법인거래목적코드 : 04.대리인거래 AND B.INSN_FUNS_ORIG_CODE = '07')) -- 법인자금원천코드 : 07.대리인거래

INSERT INTO SSQ.L_CDD_MNTN_DTLD ( MNTN_DATE , MNTN_STNR_CODE , CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID , CDD_FLFL_SQNO , MNTN_DTLS_CTNT , PRCE_DATE_TIME , ACTN_RSLT_SECT_CODE ) SELECT A.CDD_FLFL_DATE , 'CDD_203' , A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID , A.CDD_FLFL_SQNO , '영문(해외)주소 미존재; 거주국가 : ' || NVL(R.CNTY_CODE, 'XX') || '.' || NVL((SELECT TRIM(T.CNTY_NAME) FROM SID.IDO_A_UUE_COUNTRY_NAME T WHERE T.LANG_CODE = 'KO' AND T.CNTY_ID = A.RSDT_CNTY_ID AND ROWNUM = 1 ), '') , SYSDATE , 'N'
FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_DTLD A LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_CNTT_ADDR_IF B12 -- 개인CDD-자택 ON B12.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID AND B12.CDD_FLFL_SQNO = A.CDD_FLFL_SQNO AND B12.CDD_CNTT_ADDR_SECT_CODE = 'ADR' AND B12.CDD_CNTT_ADDR_TAGT_CODE = '12' LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUE_ADDRESS U12 ON U12.CNTT_ADDR_ID = B12.CNTT_ADDR_ID
LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_CNTT_ADDR_IF B13 -- 개인CDD-직장 ON B13.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID AND B13.CDD_FLFL_SQNO = A.CDD_FLFL_SQNO AND B13.CDD_CNTT_ADDR_SECT_CODE = 'ADR' AND B13.CDD_CNTT_ADDR_TAGT_CODE = '13' LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUE_ADDRESS U13 ON U13.CNTT_ADDR_ID = B13.CNTT_ADDR_ID
LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_CNTT_ADDR_IF B14 -- 개인CDD-실제거소 ON B14.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID AND B14.CDD_FLFL_SQNO = A.CDD_FLFL_SQNO AND B14.CDD_CNTT_ADDR_SECT_CODE = 'ADR' AND B14.CDD_CNTT_ADDR_TAGT_CODE = '14' LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUE_ADDRESS U14 ON U14.CNTT_ADDR_ID = B14.CNTT_ADDR_ID
LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_CNTT_ADDR_IF B21 -- 법인CDD-사업장 ON B21.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID AND B21.CDD_FLFL_SQNO = A.CDD_FLFL_SQNO AND B21.CDD_CNTT_ADDR_SECT_CODE = 'ADR' AND B21.CDD_CNTT_ADDR_TAGT_CODE = '21' LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUE_ADDRESS U21 ON U21.CNTT_ADDR_ID = B21.CNTT_ADDR_ID
LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_CNTT_ADDR_IF B22 -- 법인CDD-본점 ON B22.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID AND B22.CDD_FLFL_SQNO = A.CDD_FLFL_SQNO AND B22.CDD_CNTT_ADDR_SECT_CODE = 'ADR' AND B22.CDD_CNTT_ADDR_TAGT_CODE = '22' LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUE_ADDRESS U22 ON U22.CNTT_ADDR_ID = B22.CNTT_ADDR_ID
LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_UUE_COUNTRY R ON A.RSDT_CNTY_ID = R.CNTY_ID
WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.DEL_YN <> 'Y' AND TRIM(A.CDD_FLFL_DATE) IS NOT NULL AND A.CLNT_RISK_RTNG_CODE IN ('H', 'M', 'L') AND A.PRCE_CHNL_SECT_CODE LIKE 'A%' AND A.CDD_FLFL_DATE = #{yyyymmdd}
AND A.RSDT_CNTY_ID > 0 AND A.RSDT_CNTY_ID <> 1000000001 -- 거주국가ID
AND ((TRIM(U12.PSTL_CODE) NOT IN ('00000', '000000') OR NVL(TRIM(U12.PSTL_CODE), 'X') = 'X') AND (TRIM(U13.PSTL_CODE) NOT IN ('00000', '000000') OR NVL(TRIM(U13.PSTL_CODE), 'X') = 'X') AND (TRIM(U13.PSTL_CODE) NOT IN ('00000', '000000') OR NVL(TRIM(U13.PSTL_CODE), 'X') = 'X') AND (TRIM(U14.PSTL_CODE) NOT IN ('00000', '000000') OR NVL(TRIM(U14.PSTL_CODE), 'X') = 'X') AND (TRIM(U21.PSTL_CODE) NOT IN ('00000', '000000') OR NVL(TRIM(U21.PSTL_CODE), 'X') = 'X') AND (TRIM(U22.PSTL_CODE) NOT IN ('00000', '000000') OR NVL(TRIM(U22.PSTL_CODE), 'X') = 'X'))

INSERT INTO SSQ.L_CDD_MNTN_DTLD ( MNTN_DATE , MNTN_STNR_CODE , CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID , CDD_FLFL_SQNO , MNTN_DTLS_CTNT , PRCE_DATE_TIME , ACTN_RSLT_SECT_CODE ) SELECT A.CDD_FLFL_DATE , 'CDD_206' , A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID , A.CDD_FLFL_SQNO , '대표자(고령/미성년자) : 대표자1(' || A.RPST_1_BRDT || ',' || TRIM(A.RPST_1_NAME) || ')' || CASE WHEN TRIM(A.RPST_2_BRDT) IS NOT NULL THEN ';대표자2(' || A.RPST_2_BRDT || ',' || TRIM(A.RPST_2_NAME) || ')' ELSE '' END || CASE WHEN TRIM(A.RPST_3_BRDT) IS NOT NULL THEN ';대표자3(' || A.RPST_3_BRDT || ',' || TRIM(A.RPST_3_NAME) || ')' ELSE '' END , SYSDATE , 'N'
FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_DTLD A INNER JOIN SSQ.L_DATE_STND_VALU X ON X.DATE_TYPE_SDVL = 'YYYYMMDD' AND X.DATE_ANLY_SDVL = A.CDD_FLFL_DATE
LEFT OUTER JOIN SSQ.L_DATE_STND_VALU X1 ON X1.DATE_TYPE_SDVL = 'YYYYMMDD' AND X1.DATE_ANLY_SDVL = A.RPST_1_BRDT LEFT OUTER JOIN SSQ.L_DATE_STND_VALU X2 ON X2.DATE_TYPE_SDVL = 'YYYYMMDD' AND X2.DATE_ANLY_SDVL = A.RPST_2_BRDT LEFT OUTER JOIN SSQ.L_DATE_STND_VALU X3 ON X3.DATE_TYPE_SDVL = 'YYYYMMDD' AND X3.DATE_ANLY_SDVL = A.RPST_3_BRDT
WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.DEL_YN <> 'Y' AND TRIM(A.CDD_FLFL_DATE) IS NOT NULL AND A.CLNT_RISK_RTNG_CODE IN ('H', 'M', 'L') AND A.PRCE_CHNL_SECT_CODE LIKE 'A%' AND A.CDD_FLFL_DATE = #{yyyymmdd}
AND A.CDD_CLNT_SECT_CODE IN ('2', '3') -- 법인
AND ((TRIM(A.RPST_1_BRDT) IS NOT NULL AND (TRUNC(MONTHS_BETWEEN(TO_DATE(X.DATE_ANLY_SDVL, 'YYYYMMDD'), TO_DATE(X1.DATE_ANLY_SDVL, 'YYYYMMDD')) / 12) >= 100 OR TRUNC(MONTHS_BETWEEN(TO_DATE(X.DATE_ANLY_SDVL, 'YYYYMMDD'), TO_DATE(X1.DATE_ANLY_SDVL, 'YYYYMMDD')) / 12) <= 10 OR A.RPST_1_BRDT > TRIM(A.CDD_FLFL_DATE))) OR (TRIM(A.RPST_2_BRDT) IS NOT NULL AND (TRUNC(MONTHS_BETWEEN(TO_DATE(X.DATE_ANLY_SDVL, 'YYYYMMDD'), TO_DATE(X2.DATE_ANLY_SDVL, 'YYYYMMDD')) / 12) >= 100 OR TRUNC(MONTHS_BETWEEN(TO_DATE(X.DATE_ANLY_SDVL, 'YYYYMMDD'), TO_DATE(X2.DATE_ANLY_SDVL, 'YYYYMMDD')) / 12) <= 10 OR A.RPST_2_BRDT > TRIM(A.CDD_FLFL_DATE))) OR (TRIM(A.RPST_3_BRDT) IS NOT NULL AND (TRUNC(MONTHS_BETWEEN(TO_DATE(X.DATE_ANLY_SDVL, 'YYYYMMDD'), TO_DATE(X3.DATE_ANLY_SDVL, 'YYYYMMDD')) / 12) >= 100 OR TRUNC(MONTHS_BETWEEN(TO_DATE(X.DATE_ANLY_SDVL, 'YYYYMMDD'), TO_DATE(X3.DATE_ANLY_SDVL, 'YYYYMMDD')) / 12) <= 10 OR A.RPST_3_BRDT > TRIM(A.CDD_FLFL_DATE))))

INSERT INTO SSQ.L_CDD_MNTN_DTLD ( MNTN_DATE , MNTN_STNR_CODE , CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID , CDD_FLFL_SQNO , MNTN_DTLS_CTNT , PRCE_DATE_TIME , ACTN_RSLT_SECT_CODE ) SELECT A.CDD_FLFL_DATE , 'CDD_207' , A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID , A.CDD_FLFL_SQNO , '설립일자 : ' || A.ETDT , SYSDATE , 'N'
FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_DTLD A INNER JOIN SSQ.L_DATE_STND_VALU X1 ON X1.DATE_TYPE_SDVL = 'YYYYMMDD' AND X1.DATE_ANLY_SDVL = A.CDD_FLFL_DATE
INNER JOIN SSQ.L_DATE_STND_VALU X2 ON X2.DATE_TYPE_SDVL = 'YYYYMMDD' AND X2.DATE_ANLY_SDVL = A.ETDT
WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.DEL_YN <> 'Y' AND TRIM(A.CDD_FLFL_DATE) IS NOT NULL AND A.CLNT_RISK_RTNG_CODE IN ('H', 'M', 'L') AND A.PRCE_CHNL_SECT_CODE LIKE 'A%' AND A.CDD_FLFL_DATE = #{yyyymmdd}
AND A.CDD_CLNT_SECT_CODE IN ('2', '3') -- 법인
AND TRUNC(MONTHS_BETWEEN(TO_DATE(X1.DATE_ANLY_SDVL, 'YYYYMMDD'), TO_DATE(X2.DATE_ANLY_SDVL, 'YYYYMMDD')) / 12) >= 100

INSERT INTO SSQ.L_CDD_MNTN_DTLD ( MNTN_DATE , MNTN_STNR_CODE , CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID , CDD_FLFL_SQNO , MNTN_DTLS_CTNT , PRCE_DATE_TIME , ACTN_RSLT_SECT_CODE ) SELECT A.CDD_FLFL_DATE , 'CDD_208' , A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID , A.CDD_FLFL_SQNO , CASE WHEN TRIM(B01.REL_OWNR_BRDT) IS NOT NULL THEN '실제소유자 : ' || TRIM(B01.REL_OWNR_NAME) || '(' || TRIM(B01.REL_OWNR_BRDT) || ')' ELSE '' END || CASE WHEN TRIM(B02.REL_OWNR_BRDT) IS NOT NULL THEN ';' || TRIM(B02.REL_OWNR_NAME) || '(' || TRIM(B02.REL_OWNR_BRDT) || ')' ELSE '' END || CASE WHEN TRIM(B03.REL_OWNR_BRDT) IS NOT NULL THEN ';' || TRIM(B03.REL_OWNR_NAME) || '(' || TRIM(B03.REL_OWNR_BRDT) || ')' ELSE '' END || CASE WHEN TRIM(B04.REL_OWNR_BRDT) IS NOT NULL THEN ';' || TRIM(B04.REL_OWNR_NAME) || '(' || TRIM(B04.REL_OWNR_BRDT) || ')' ELSE '' END || CASE WHEN TRIM(B05.REL_OWNR_BRDT) IS NOT NULL THEN ';' || TRIM(B05.REL_OWNR_NAME) || '(' || TRIM(B05.REL_OWNR_BRDT) || ')' ELSE '' END || CASE WHEN TRIM(B06.REL_OWNR_BRDT) IS NOT NULL THEN ';' || TRIM(B06.REL_OWNR_NAME) || '(' || TRIM(B06.REL_OWNR_BRDT) || ')' ELSE '' END || CASE WHEN TRIM(B07.REL_OWNR_BRDT) IS NOT NULL THEN ';' || TRIM(B07.REL_OWNR_NAME) || '(' || TRIM(B07.REL_OWNR_BRDT) || ')' ELSE '' END || CASE WHEN TRIM(B08.REL_OWNR_BRDT) IS NOT NULL THEN ';' || TRIM(B08.REL_OWNR_NAME) || '(' || TRIM(B08.REL_OWNR_BRDT) || ')' ELSE '' END || CASE WHEN TRIM(B09.REL_OWNR_BRDT) IS NOT NULL THEN ';' || TRIM(B09.REL_OWNR_NAME) || '(' || TRIM(B09.REL_OWNR_BRDT) || ')' ELSE '' END || CASE WHEN TRIM(B10.REL_OWNR_BRDT) IS NOT NULL THEN ';' || TRIM(B10.REL_OWNR_NAME) || '(' || TRIM(B10.REL_OWNR_BRDT) || ')' ELSE '' END AS OWNR , SYSDATE , 'N'
FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_DTLD A INNER JOIN SSQ.L_DATE_STND_VALU X ON X.DATE_TYPE_SDVL = 'YYYYMMDD' AND X.DATE_ANLY_SDVL = A.CDD_FLFL_DATE
LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_REL_OWNR_IFMN B01 ON B01.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID AND B01.CDD_FLFL_SQNO = A.CDD_FLFL_SQNO AND B01.REL_OWNR_SQNO = 1 LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_REL_OWNR_IFMN B02 ON B02.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID AND B02.CDD_FLFL_SQNO = A.CDD_FLFL_SQNO AND B02.REL_OWNR_SQNO = 2 LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_REL_OWNR_IFMN B03 ON B03.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID AND B03.CDD_FLFL_SQNO = A.CDD_FLFL_SQNO AND B03.REL_OWNR_SQNO = 3 LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_REL_OWNR_IFMN B04 ON B04.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID AND B04.CDD_FLFL_SQNO = A.CDD_FLFL_SQNO AND B04.REL_OWNR_SQNO = 4 LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_REL_OWNR_IFMN B05 ON B05.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID AND B05.CDD_FLFL_SQNO = A.CDD_FLFL_SQNO AND B05.REL_OWNR_SQNO = 5 LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_REL_OWNR_IFMN B06 ON B06.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID AND B06.CDD_FLFL_SQNO = A.CDD_FLFL_SQNO AND B06.REL_OWNR_SQNO = 6 LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_REL_OWNR_IFMN B07 ON B07.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID AND B07.CDD_FLFL_SQNO = A.CDD_FLFL_SQNO AND B07.REL_OWNR_SQNO = 7 LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_REL_OWNR_IFMN B08 ON B08.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID AND B08.CDD_FLFL_SQNO = A.CDD_FLFL_SQNO AND B08.REL_OWNR_SQNO = 8 LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_REL_OWNR_IFMN B09 ON B09.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID AND B09.CDD_FLFL_SQNO = A.CDD_FLFL_SQNO AND B09.REL_OWNR_SQNO = 9 LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_REL_OWNR_IFMN B10 ON B10.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID AND B10.CDD_FLFL_SQNO = A.CDD_FLFL_SQNO AND B10.REL_OWNR_SQNO = 10
LEFT OUTER JOIN SSQ.L_DATE_STND_VALU X01 ON X01.DATE_TYPE_SDVL = 'YYYYMMDD' AND X01.DATE_ANLY_SDVL = B01.REL_OWNR_BRDT
LEFT OUTER JOIN SSQ.L_DATE_STND_VALU X02 ON X02.DATE_TYPE_SDVL = 'YYYYMMDD' AND X02.DATE_ANLY_SDVL = B02.REL_OWNR_BRDT
LEFT OUTER JOIN SSQ.L_DATE_STND_VALU X03 ON X03.DATE_TYPE_SDVL = 'YYYYMMDD' AND X03.DATE_ANLY_SDVL = B03.REL_OWNR_BRDT
LEFT OUTER JOIN SSQ.L_DATE_STND_VALU X04 ON X04.DATE_TYPE_SDVL = 'YYYYMMDD' AND X04.DATE_ANLY_SDVL = B04.REL_OWNR_BRDT
LEFT OUTER JOIN SSQ.L_DATE_STND_VALU X05 ON X05.DATE_TYPE_SDVL = 'YYYYMMDD' AND X05.DATE_ANLY_SDVL = B05.REL_OWNR_BRDT
LEFT OUTER JOIN SSQ.L_DATE_STND_VALU X06 ON X06.DATE_TYPE_SDVL = 'YYYYMMDD' AND X06.DATE_ANLY_SDVL = B06.REL_OWNR_BRDT
LEFT OUTER JOIN SSQ.L_DATE_STND_VALU X07 ON X07.DATE_TYPE_SDVL = 'YYYYMMDD' AND X07.DATE_ANLY_SDVL = B07.REL_OWNR_BRDT
LEFT OUTER JOIN SSQ.L_DATE_STND_VALU X08 ON X08.DATE_TYPE_SDVL = 'YYYYMMDD' AND X08.DATE_ANLY_SDVL = B08.REL_OWNR_BRDT
LEFT OUTER JOIN SSQ.L_DATE_STND_VALU X09 ON X09.DATE_TYPE_SDVL = 'YYYYMMDD' AND X09.DATE_ANLY_SDVL = B09.REL_OWNR_BRDT
LEFT OUTER JOIN SSQ.L_DATE_STND_VALU X10 ON X10.DATE_TYPE_SDVL = 'YYYYMMDD' AND X10.DATE_ANLY_SDVL = B02.REL_OWNR_BRDT
WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.DEL_YN <> 'Y' AND TRIM(A.CDD_FLFL_DATE) IS NOT NULL AND A.CLNT_RISK_RTNG_CODE IN ('H', 'M', 'L') AND A.PRCE_CHNL_SECT_CODE LIKE 'A%' AND A.CDD_CLNT_SECT_CODE IN ('2', '3') -- 법인
AND A.CDD_FLFL_DATE = #{yyyymmdd}
AND (TRUNC(MONTHS_BETWEEN(TO_DATE(X.DATE_ANLY_SDVL, 'YYYYMMDD'), TO_DATE(X01.DATE_ANLY_SDVL, 'YYYYMMDD')) / 12) <= 10 OR TRUNC(MONTHS_BETWEEN(TO_DATE(X.DATE_ANLY_SDVL, 'YYYYMMDD'), TO_DATE(X02.DATE_ANLY_SDVL, 'YYYYMMDD')) / 12) <= 10 OR TRUNC(MONTHS_BETWEEN(TO_DATE(X.DATE_ANLY_SDVL, 'YYYYMMDD'), TO_DATE(X03.DATE_ANLY_SDVL, 'YYYYMMDD')) / 12) <= 10 OR TRUNC(MONTHS_BETWEEN(TO_DATE(X.DATE_ANLY_SDVL, 'YYYYMMDD'), TO_DATE(X04.DATE_ANLY_SDVL, 'YYYYMMDD')) / 12) <= 10 OR TRUNC(MONTHS_BETWEEN(TO_DATE(X.DATE_ANLY_SDVL, 'YYYYMMDD'), TO_DATE(X05.DATE_ANLY_SDVL, 'YYYYMMDD')) / 12) <= 10 OR TRUNC(MONTHS_BETWEEN(TO_DATE(X.DATE_ANLY_SDVL, 'YYYYMMDD'), TO_DATE(X06.DATE_ANLY_SDVL, 'YYYYMMDD')) / 12) <= 10 OR TRUNC(MONTHS_BETWEEN(TO_DATE(X.DATE_ANLY_SDVL, 'YYYYMMDD'), TO_DATE(X07.DATE_ANLY_SDVL, 'YYYYMMDD')) / 12) <= 10 OR TRUNC(MONTHS_BETWEEN(TO_DATE(X.DATE_ANLY_SDVL, 'YYYYMMDD'), TO_DATE(X08.DATE_ANLY_SDVL, 'YYYYMMDD')) / 12) <= 10 OR TRUNC(MONTHS_BETWEEN(TO_DATE(X.DATE_ANLY_SDVL, 'YYYYMMDD'), TO_DATE(X09.DATE_ANLY_SDVL, 'YYYYMMDD')) / 12) <= 10 OR TRUNC(MONTHS_BETWEEN(TO_DATE(X.DATE_ANLY_SDVL, 'YYYYMMDD'), TO_DATE(X10.DATE_ANLY_SDVL, 'YYYYMMDD')) / 12) <= 10
OR TRUNC(MONTHS_BETWEEN(TO_DATE(X.DATE_ANLY_SDVL, 'YYYYMMDD'), TO_DATE(X01.DATE_ANLY_SDVL, 'YYYYMMDD')) / 12) >= 100 OR TRUNC(MONTHS_BETWEEN(TO_DATE(X.DATE_ANLY_SDVL, 'YYYYMMDD'), TO_DATE(X02.DATE_ANLY_SDVL, 'YYYYMMDD')) / 12) >= 100 OR TRUNC(MONTHS_BETWEEN(TO_DATE(X.DATE_ANLY_SDVL, 'YYYYMMDD'), TO_DATE(X03.DATE_ANLY_SDVL, 'YYYYMMDD')) / 12) >= 100 OR TRUNC(MONTHS_BETWEEN(TO_DATE(X.DATE_ANLY_SDVL, 'YYYYMMDD'), TO_DATE(X04.DATE_ANLY_SDVL, 'YYYYMMDD')) / 12) >= 100 OR TRUNC(MONTHS_BETWEEN(TO_DATE(X.DATE_ANLY_SDVL, 'YYYYMMDD'), TO_DATE(X05.DATE_ANLY_SDVL, 'YYYYMMDD')) / 12) >= 100 OR TRUNC(MONTHS_BETWEEN(TO_DATE(X.DATE_ANLY_SDVL, 'YYYYMMDD'), TO_DATE(X06.DATE_ANLY_SDVL, 'YYYYMMDD')) / 12) >= 100 OR TRUNC(MONTHS_BETWEEN(TO_DATE(X.DATE_ANLY_SDVL, 'YYYYMMDD'), TO_DATE(X07.DATE_ANLY_SDVL, 'YYYYMMDD')) / 12) >= 100 OR TRUNC(MONTHS_BETWEEN(TO_DATE(X.DATE_ANLY_SDVL, 'YYYYMMDD'), TO_DATE(X08.DATE_ANLY_SDVL, 'YYYYMMDD')) / 12) >= 100 OR TRUNC(MONTHS_BETWEEN(TO_DATE(X.DATE_ANLY_SDVL, 'YYYYMMDD'), TO_DATE(X09.DATE_ANLY_SDVL, 'YYYYMMDD')) / 12) >= 100 OR TRUNC(MONTHS_BETWEEN(TO_DATE(X.DATE_ANLY_SDVL, 'YYYYMMDD'), TO_DATE(X10.DATE_ANLY_SDVL, 'YYYYMMDD')) / 12) >= 100
OR X01.DATE_ANLY_SDVL > A.CDD_FLFL_DATE OR X02.DATE_ANLY_SDVL > A.CDD_FLFL_DATE OR X03.DATE_ANLY_SDVL > A.CDD_FLFL_DATE OR X04.DATE_ANLY_SDVL > A.CDD_FLFL_DATE OR X05.DATE_ANLY_SDVL > A.CDD_FLFL_DATE OR X06.DATE_ANLY_SDVL > A.CDD_FLFL_DATE OR X07.DATE_ANLY_SDVL > A.CDD_FLFL_DATE OR X08.DATE_ANLY_SDVL > A.CDD_FLFL_DATE OR X09.DATE_ANLY_SDVL > A.CDD_FLFL_DATE OR X10.DATE_ANLY_SDVL > A.CDD_FLFL_DATE)

INSERT INTO SSQ.L_CDD_MNTN_DTLD ( MNTN_DATE , MNTN_STNR_CODE , CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID , CDD_FLFL_SQNO , MNTN_DTLS_CTNT , PRCE_DATE_TIME , ACTN_RSLT_SECT_CODE ) SELECT A.CDD_FLFL_DATE , 'CDD_209' , A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID , A.CDD_FLFL_SQNO , '대표자 :' || CASE WHEN TRIM(A.RPST_1_NAME) IS NOT NULL THEN ' ' || TRIM(A.RPST_1_NAME) ELSE '' END || CASE WHEN TRIM(A.RPST_2_NAME) IS NOT NULL THEN ';' || TRIM(A.RPST_2_NAME) ELSE '' END || CASE WHEN TRIM(A.RPST_3_NAME) IS NOT NULL THEN ';' || TRIM(A.RPST_3_NAME) ELSE '' END ||
' - 실제소유자 :' || CASE WHEN TRIM(B01.REL_OWNR_NAME) IS NOT NULL THEN ' ' || TRIM(B01.REL_OWNR_NAME) ELSE '' END || CASE WHEN TRIM(B02.REL_OWNR_NAME) IS NOT NULL THEN ';' || TRIM(B02.REL_OWNR_NAME) ELSE '' END || CASE WHEN TRIM(B03.REL_OWNR_NAME) IS NOT NULL THEN ';' || TRIM(B03.REL_OWNR_NAME) ELSE '' END || CASE WHEN TRIM(B04.REL_OWNR_NAME) IS NOT NULL THEN ';' || TRIM(B04.REL_OWNR_NAME) ELSE '' END || CASE WHEN TRIM(B05.REL_OWNR_NAME) IS NOT NULL THEN ';' || TRIM(B05.REL_OWNR_NAME) ELSE '' END || CASE WHEN TRIM(B06.REL_OWNR_NAME) IS NOT NULL THEN ';' || TRIM(B06.REL_OWNR_NAME) ELSE '' END || CASE WHEN TRIM(B07.REL_OWNR_NAME) IS NOT NULL THEN ';' || TRIM(B07.REL_OWNR_NAME) ELSE '' END || CASE WHEN TRIM(B08.REL_OWNR_NAME) IS NOT NULL THEN ';' || TRIM(B08.REL_OWNR_NAME) ELSE '' END || CASE WHEN TRIM(B09.REL_OWNR_NAME) IS NOT NULL THEN ';' || TRIM(B09.REL_OWNR_NAME) ELSE '' END || CASE WHEN TRIM(B10.REL_OWNR_NAME) IS NOT NULL THEN ';' || TRIM(B10.REL_OWNR_NAME) ELSE '' END AS MNTN_DTLS_CTNT , SYSDATE , 'N'
FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_DTLD A
LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_REL_OWNR_IFMN B01 ON B01.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID AND B01.CDD_FLFL_SQNO = A.CDD_FLFL_SQNO AND B01.REL_OWNR_SQNO = 1 AND B01.REL_OWNR_CNFM_MTHD_CODE = '5' LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_REL_OWNR_IFMN B02 ON B02.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID AND B02.CDD_FLFL_SQNO = A.CDD_FLFL_SQNO AND B02.REL_OWNR_SQNO = 2 AND B02.REL_OWNR_CNFM_MTHD_CODE = '5' LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_REL_OWNR_IFMN B03 ON B03.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID AND B03.CDD_FLFL_SQNO = A.CDD_FLFL_SQNO AND B03.REL_OWNR_SQNO = 3 AND B03.REL_OWNR_CNFM_MTHD_CODE = '5' LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_REL_OWNR_IFMN B04 ON B04.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID AND B04.CDD_FLFL_SQNO = A.CDD_FLFL_SQNO AND B04.REL_OWNR_SQNO = 4 AND B04.REL_OWNR_CNFM_MTHD_CODE = '5' LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_REL_OWNR_IFMN B05 ON B05.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID AND B05.CDD_FLFL_SQNO = A.CDD_FLFL_SQNO AND B05.REL_OWNR_SQNO = 5 AND B05.REL_OWNR_CNFM_MTHD_CODE = '5' LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_REL_OWNR_IFMN B06 ON B06.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID AND B06.CDD_FLFL_SQNO = A.CDD_FLFL_SQNO AND B06.REL_OWNR_SQNO = 6 AND B06.REL_OWNR_CNFM_MTHD_CODE = '5' LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_REL_OWNR_IFMN B07 ON B07.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID AND B07.CDD_FLFL_SQNO = A.CDD_FLFL_SQNO AND B07.REL_OWNR_SQNO = 7 AND B07.REL_OWNR_CNFM_MTHD_CODE = '5' LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_REL_OWNR_IFMN B08 ON B08.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID AND B08.CDD_FLFL_SQNO = A.CDD_FLFL_SQNO AND B08.REL_OWNR_SQNO = 8 AND B08.REL_OWNR_CNFM_MTHD_CODE = '5' LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_REL_OWNR_IFMN B09 ON B09.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID AND B09.CDD_FLFL_SQNO = A.CDD_FLFL_SQNO AND B09.REL_OWNR_SQNO = 9 AND B09.REL_OWNR_CNFM_MTHD_CODE = '5' LEFT OUTER JOIN SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_REL_OWNR_IFMN B10 ON B10.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID AND B10.CDD_FLFL_SQNO = A.CDD_FLFL_SQNO AND B10.REL_OWNR_SQNO = 10 AND B10.REL_OWNR_CNFM_MTHD_CODE = '5'
WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.DEL_YN <> 'Y' AND TRIM(A.CDD_FLFL_DATE) IS NOT NULL AND A.CLNT_RISK_RTNG_CODE IN ('H', 'M', 'L') AND A.PRCE_CHNL_SECT_CODE LIKE 'A%' AND A.CDD_CLNT_SECT_CODE IN ('2', '3') -- 법인 AND A.RGBR_CODE NOT IN ('19911', '19910') AND A.CDD_FLFL_DATE = #{yyyymmdd}
AND (NVL(TRIM(B01.REL_OWNR_NAME), '@!$#') <> '@!$#' OR NVL(TRIM(B02.REL_OWNR_NAME), '@!$#') <> '@!$#' OR NVL(TRIM(B03.REL_OWNR_NAME), '@!$#') <> '@!$#' OR NVL(TRIM(B04.REL_OWNR_NAME), '@!$#') <> '@!$#' OR NVL(TRIM(B05.REL_OWNR_NAME), '@!$#') <> '@!$#' OR NVL(TRIM(B06.REL_OWNR_NAME), '@!$#') <> '@!$#' OR NVL(TRIM(B07.REL_OWNR_NAME), '@!$#') <> '@!$#' OR NVL(TRIM(B08.REL_OWNR_NAME), '@!$#') <> '@!$#' OR NVL(TRIM(B09.REL_OWNR_NAME), '@!$#') <> '@!$#' OR NVL(TRIM(B10.REL_OWNR_NAME), '@!$#') <> '@!$#')
AND (NVL(TRIM(B01.REL_OWNR_NAME), '@!$#') NOT IN (NVL(TRIM(A.RPST_1_NAME), '#1'), NVL(TRIM(A.RPST_2_NAME), '#2'), NVL(TRIM(A.RPST_3_NAME), '#3')) AND NVL(TRIM(B02.REL_OWNR_NAME), '@!$#') NOT IN (NVL(TRIM(A.RPST_1_NAME), '#1'), NVL(TRIM(A.RPST_2_NAME), '#2'), NVL(TRIM(A.RPST_3_NAME), '#3')) AND NVL(TRIM(B03.REL_OWNR_NAME), '@!$#') NOT IN (NVL(TRIM(A.RPST_1_NAME), '#1'), NVL(TRIM(A.RPST_2_NAME), '#2'), NVL(TRIM(A.RPST_3_NAME), '#3')) AND NVL(TRIM(B04.REL_OWNR_NAME), '@!$#') NOT IN (NVL(TRIM(A.RPST_1_NAME), '#1'), NVL(TRIM(A.RPST_2_NAME), '#2'), NVL(TRIM(A.RPST_3_NAME), '#3')) AND NVL(TRIM(B05.REL_OWNR_NAME), '@!$#') NOT IN (NVL(TRIM(A.RPST_1_NAME), '#1'), NVL(TRIM(A.RPST_2_NAME), '#2'), NVL(TRIM(A.RPST_3_NAME), '#3')) AND NVL(TRIM(B06.REL_OWNR_NAME), '@!$#') NOT IN (NVL(TRIM(A.RPST_1_NAME), '#1'), NVL(TRIM(A.RPST_2_NAME), '#2'), NVL(TRIM(A.RPST_3_NAME), '#3')) AND NVL(TRIM(B07.REL_OWNR_NAME), '@!$#') NOT IN (NVL(TRIM(A.RPST_1_NAME), '#1'), NVL(TRIM(A.RPST_2_NAME), '#2'), NVL(TRIM(A.RPST_3_NAME), '#3')) AND NVL(TRIM(B08.REL_OWNR_NAME), '@!$#') NOT IN (NVL(TRIM(A.RPST_1_NAME), '#1'), NVL(TRIM(A.RPST_2_NAME), '#2'), NVL(TRIM(A.RPST_3_NAME), '#3')) AND NVL(TRIM(B09.REL_OWNR_NAME), '@!$#') NOT IN (NVL(TRIM(A.RPST_1_NAME), '#1'), NVL(TRIM(A.RPST_2_NAME), '#2'), NVL(TRIM(A.RPST_3_NAME), '#3')) AND NVL(TRIM(B10.REL_OWNR_NAME), '@!$#') NOT IN (NVL(TRIM(A.RPST_1_NAME), '#1'), NVL(TRIM(A.RPST_2_NAME), '#2'), NVL(TRIM(A.RPST_3_NAME), '#3')))

INSERT INTO SSQ.L_CDD_MNTN_DTLD ( MNTN_DATE , MNTN_STNR_CODE , CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID , CDD_FLFL_SQNO , MNTN_DTLS_CTNT , PRCE_DATE_TIME , ACTN_RSLT_SECT_CODE ) SELECT A.CDD_FLFL_DATE , 'CDD_212' , A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID , A.CDD_FLFL_SQNO , '생년월일 : ' || A.BRDT || ', 직업 : ' || A.JOB_CODE || '.' || NVL((SELECT TRIM(T.CMN_CDVL_NAME) FROM SID.IDO_A_UWB_COM_CD_DTL T WHERE T.CMN_CODE_ID = '01437' AND T.CMN_CDVL = A.JOB_CODE), '') || CASE WHEN SUBSTR(A.JOB_CODE, 2,2) = '90' AND TRIM(A.JOB_NAME) IS NOT NULL THEN '-' || TRIM(A.JOB_NAME) ELSE '' END , SYSDATE , 'N'
FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_DTLD A INNER JOIN SSQ.L_DATE_STND_VALU X1 ON X1.DATE_TYPE_SDVL = 'YYYYMMDD' AND X1.DATE_ANLY_SDVL = A.CDD_FLFL_DATE INNER JOIN SSQ.L_DATE_STND_VALU X2 ON X2.DATE_TYPE_SDVL = 'YYYYMMDD' AND X2.DATE_ANLY_SDVL = A.BRDT WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.DEL_YN <> 'Y' AND TRIM(A.CDD_FLFL_DATE) IS NOT NULL AND A.CLNT_RISK_RTNG_CODE IN ('H', 'M', 'L') AND A.PRCE_CHNL_SECT_CODE LIKE 'A%' AND A.CDD_FLFL_DATE = #{yyyymmdd}
AND A.CDD_CLNT_SECT_CODE = '1' -- 개인 AND TRIM(A.BRDT) IS NOT NULL AND A.JOB_CODE = '960'
AND TRUNC(MONTHS_BETWEEN(TO_DATE(X1.DATE_ANLY_SDVL, 'YYYYMMDD'), TO_DATE(X2.DATE_ANLY_SDVL, 'YYYYMMDD')) / 12) >= 19

INSERT INTO SSQ.L_CDD_MNTN_DTLD ( MNTN_DATE , MNTN_STNR_CODE , CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID , CDD_FLFL_SQNO , MNTN_DTLS_CTNT , PRCE_DATE_TIME , ACTN_RSLT_SECT_CODE ) SELECT a.CDD_FLFL_DATE , 'CDD_214' , a.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID , a.CDD_FLFL_SQNO , '법인설립일자 공란인 경우' , SYSDATE , 'N' FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_DTLD A WHERE a.CDD_FLFL_DATE = #{yyyymmdd} AND A.CDD_CLNT_SECT_CODE <> '1' -- 1개인 2,3법인 AND TRIM(ETDT) IS NULL AND TRIM(cdd_flfl_date) IS NOT NULL

INSERT INTO SSQ.L_CDD_MNTN_DTLD ( MNTN_DATE , MNTN_STNR_CODE , CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID , CDD_FLFL_SQNO , MNTN_DTLS_CTNT , PRCE_DATE_TIME , ACTN_RSLT_SECT_CODE ) SELECT a.CDD_FLFL_DATE , 'CDD_215' , a.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID , a.CDD_FLFL_SQNO , '실명확인증표 발급일자 공란인 경우 - 실명확인증증표 : ' ||TRIM(RLNM_CNFM_TKN_CODE) || ' ' ||(SELECT CMN_CDVL_NAME FROM SID.IDO_A_UWB_COM_CD_DTL WHERE DEL_YN= 'N' AND USE_YN = 'Y' AND CMN_CODE_ID = '06758' AND CMN_CDVL = A.RLNM_CNFM_TKN_CODE) || ', 발급일자 : ' || TRIM(ISNC_DATE) , SYSDATE , 'N' FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_DTLD A WHERE a.CDD_FLFL_DATE = #{yyyymmdd} AND TRIM(ISNC_DATE) IS NULL AND TRIM(RLNM_CNFM_TKN_CODE) IS NOT NULL

INSERT INTO SSQ.L_CDD_MNTN_DTLD ( MNTN_DATE , MNTN_STNR_CODE , CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID , CDD_FLFL_SQNO , MNTN_DTLS_CTNT , PRCE_DATE_TIME , ACTN_RSLT_SECT_CODE ) SELECT A.CDD_FLFL_DATE AS CDD수행일자 , 'CDD_216' , A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID AS 고객엔티티ID , A.CDD_FLFL_SQNO AS CDD순번 , 'CDD등록사유 : ' || A.CDD_RGSN_RESN_CODE || '.' || NVL((SELECT TRIM(T.CMN_CDVL_NAME) FROM SID.IDO_A_UWB_COM_CD_DTL T WHERE T.CMN_CODE_ID = '06757' AND T.CMN_CDVL = A.CDD_RGSN_RESN_CODE AND DEL_YN = 'N'), '') || CASE WHEN A.CDD_RGSN_RESN_CODE = '99' THEN '-' || TRIM(A.CDD_RGSN_RESN_NAME) ELSE '' END AS CDD등록사유 , SYSDATE , 'N' FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_DTLD A WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.DEL_YN <> 'Y' AND TRIM(A.CDD_FLFL_DATE) IS NOT NULL AND A.CLNT_RISK_RTNG_CODE IN ('H', 'M', 'L') AND A.PRCE_CHNL_SECT_CODE LIKE 'A%' AND A.CDD_CLNT_SECT_CODE = '1' -- 1개인 AND A.CDD_FLFL_DATE = #{yyyymmdd} AND A.CDD_RGSN_RESN_CODE = '94'
