INSERT INTO SSQ.L_CDD_MNTN_DTLD ( MNTN_DATE , MNTN_STNR_CODE , CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID , CDD_FLFL_SQNO , MNTN_DTLS_CTNT , PRCE_DATE_TIME , ACTN_RSLT_SECT_CODE ) SELECT A.CDD_FLFL_DATE , 'CDD_301' , A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID , A.CDD_FLFL_SQNO , CASE WHEN TRIM(A.TAGT_CLNT_NAME) IS NULL THEN '고객명 공란' || CASE WHEN TRIM(A.CDD_TAGT_CLNT_NO_CRYP) IS NULL THEN ', 실명번호 공란' ELSE '' END ELSE CASE WHEN TRIM(A.CDD_TAGT_CLNT_NO_CRYP) IS NULL THEN '실명번호 공란' ELSE '' END END , SYSDATE , 'N' FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_DTLD A WHERE A.DEL_YN <> 'Y' AND TRIM(A.CDD_FLFL_DATE) IS NOT NULL AND A.CLNT_RISK_RTNG_CODE IN ('H', 'M', 'L') AND A.CDD_FLFL_DATE = #{yyyymmdd} AND A.CDD_CLNT_SECT_CODE = '1' AND A.RGBR_CODE IN ('21080', '11670') --21080: 채널개발팀. 11670 : 디지털업무지원팀 AND (TRIM(A.TAGT_CLNT_NAME) IS NULL OR TRIM(A.CDD_TAGT_CLNT_NO_CRYP) IS NULL)

INSERT INTO SSQ.L_CDD_MNTN_DTLD ( MNTN_DATE , MNTN_STNR_CODE , CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID , CDD_FLFL_SQNO , MNTN_DTLS_CTNT , PRCE_DATE_TIME , ACTN_RSLT_SECT_CODE ) SELECT CDD_FLFL_DATE , 'CDD_302' , CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID , CDD_FLFL_SQNO , '같은 숫자로만 구성된 연락처' , SYSDATE , 'N' FROM (SELECT A.CDD_FLFL_DATE , A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID , A.CDD_FLFL_SQNO FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_DTLD A , SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_CNTT_ADDR_IF B , SID.IDO_A_UUE_PHONE C WHERE TRIM(A.CDD_FLFL_DATE) IS NOT NULL AND A.CLNT_RISK_RTNG_CODE IN ('H', 'M', 'L') AND A.CDD_FLFL_DATE = #{yyyymmdd} AND A.RGBR_CODE IN ('21080', '11670') --21080: 채널개발팀. 11670 : 디지털업무지원팀 AND A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = B.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID AND CDD_CNTT_ADDR_SECT_CODE = 'TEL' AND B.CNTT_ADDR_ID = C.CNTT_ADDR_ID(+) AND C.PHON_NO_CRYP IN ( 'Pj+nQdI2eq0j+Z+VDDvVZQ==' /* 1111 */ , 'bNS0U4fqoor5YEfmyoPlZw==' /* 2222 */ , 'R0t5ea0pkuV4QIqq2+oqDg==' /* 3333 */ , 'RdvkOOLkioP/vukn9NwBTw==' /* 4444 */ , 'LrbX7l+ivpWenBaJjIlh4g==' /* 5555 */ , 'YMYNuLjqfQi7LjQVgAV7LQ==' /* 6666 */ , 'S2fQxA2AKL9V5XR+eu4/cw==' /* 7777 */ , '7p4vJLHxJy3qseFKbKD61A==' /* 8888 */ , 'A1iqcvratOTldsxGopMamg==' /* 9999 */ , 'pbxlHfNoIqmootYVo11MYw==' /* 0000 */ , 'gHajhP2y4y5PXs1rZNijsw==' /* 1000 */ , 'UTlri7Ek29czuN0BmcwClg==' /* 0001 */ ) UNION ALL SELECT A.CDD_FLFL_DATE , A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID , A.CDD_FLFL_SQNO FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_DTLD A , SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_CNTT_ADDR_IF B , SID.IDO_A_UUE_MOBILE C WHERE TRIM(A.CDD_FLFL_DATE) IS NOT NULL AND A.CLNT_RISK_RTNG_CODE IN ('H', 'M', 'L') AND A.CDD_FLFL_DATE = #{yyyymmdd} AND A.RGBR_CODE IN ('21080', '11670') --21080: 채널개발팀. 11670 : 디지털업무지원팀 AND A.CDD_CLNT_SECT_CODE = '1' AND A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = B.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID AND CDD_CNTT_ADDR_SECT_CODE = 'MOB' AND B.CNTT_ADDR_ID = c.CNTT_ADDR_ID(+) AND ( (C.MOBL_PHON_ECNO_CRYP IN ('Pj+nQdI2eq0j+Z+VDDvVZQ==' /* 1111 */ , 'bNS0U4fqoor5YEfmyoPlZw==' /* 2222 */ , 'R0t5ea0pkuV4QIqq2+oqDg==' /* 3333 */ , 'RdvkOOLkioP/vukn9NwBTw==' /* 4444 */ , 'LrbX7l+ivpWenBaJjIlh4g==' /* 5555 */ , 'YMYNuLjqfQi7LjQVgAV7LQ==' /* 6666 */ , 'S2fQxA2AKL9V5XR+eu4/cw==' /* 7777 */ , '7p4vJLHxJy3qseFKbKD61A==' /* 8888 */ , 'A1iqcvratOTldsxGopMamg==' /* 9999 */ , 'pbxlHfNoIqmootYVo11MYw==' /* 0000 */ , 'gHajhP2y4y5PXs1rZNijsw==' /* 1000 */ , 'UTlri7Ek29czuN0BmcwClg==' /* 0001 */ ) ) OR (C.MOBL_PHON_NO_CRYP IN ('Pj+nQdI2eq0j+Z+VDDvVZQ==' /* 1111 */ , 'bNS0U4fqoor5YEfmyoPlZw==' /* 2222 */ , 'R0t5ea0pkuV4QIqq2+oqDg==' /* 3333 */ , 'RdvkOOLkioP/vukn9NwBTw==' /* 4444 */ , 'LrbX7l+ivpWenBaJjIlh4g==' /* 5555 */ , 'YMYNuLjqfQi7LjQVgAV7LQ==' /* 6666 */ , 'S2fQxA2AKL9V5XR+eu4/cw==' /* 7777 */ , '7p4vJLHxJy3qseFKbKD61A==' /* 8888 */ , 'A1iqcvratOTldsxGopMamg==' /* 9999 */ , 'pbxlHfNoIqmootYVo11MYw==' /* 0000 */ , 'gHajhP2y4y5PXs1rZNijsw==' /* 1000 */ , 'UTlri7Ek29czuN0BmcwClg==' /* 0001 */ ) ) ) ) A

INSERT INTO SSQ.L_CDD_MNTN_DTLD ( MNTN_DATE , MNTN_STNR_CODE , CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID , CDD_FLFL_SQNO , MNTN_DTLS_CTNT , PRCE_DATE_TIME , ACTN_RSLT_SECT_CODE ) SELECT A.CDD_FLFL_DATE , 'CDD_303' , A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID , A.CDD_FLFL_SQNO , '현재 유효하지 않은 연락처' , SYSDATE , 'N' FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_DTLD A , SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_CNTT_ADDR_IF B , SID.IDO_A_UUE_MOBILE C WHERE TRIM(A.CDD_FLFL_DATE) IS NOT NULL AND A.CLNT_RISK_RTNG_CODE IN ('H', 'M', 'L') AND A.CDD_FLFL_DATE = #{yyyymmdd} AND A.RGBR_CODE IN ('21080', '11670') --21080: 채널개발팀. 11670 : 디지털업무지원팀 AND A.CDD_CLNT_SECT_CODE = '1' AND A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = B.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID AND CDD_CNTT_ADDR_SECT_CODE = 'MOB' AND B.CNTT_ADDR_ID = C.CNTT_ADDR_ID(+) AND (C.MOBL_PHON_IDNF_NO_CRYP IN ('xraRrgGVHSDW1mpORDWEZg==' /* 011 */ , '7c2fcSpgRDUU0pBZPMtW6g==' /* 016 */ , '0mrMDKwvAkx453o8JADMRQ==' /* 017 */ , 'cs+m4Wd7QgbXTjBxarfWbw==' /* 018 */ , 'IckDg0A2ue5ExCW1PxDjMg==' /* 019 */ ) )

INSERT INTO SSQ.L_CDD_MNTN_DTLD ( MNTN_DATE , MNTN_STNR_CODE , CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID , CDD_FLFL_SQNO , MNTN_DTLS_CTNT , PRCE_DATE_TIME , ACTN_RSLT_SECT_CODE ) SELECT a.CDD_FLFL_DATE , 'CDD_304' , a.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID , a.CDD_FLFL_SQNO , CASE WHEN TRIM(A.ISNC_DATE) IS NULL THEN '실명확인증표 발급일자 공란인 경우 - 실명확인증증표 : ' ||TRIM(RLNM_CNFM_TKN_CODE) || ' ' ||(SELECT CMN_CDVL_NAME FROM SID.IDO_A_UWB_COM_CD_DTL WHERE DEL_YN= 'N' AND USE_YN = 'Y' AND CMN_CODE_ID = '06758' AND CMN_CDVL = A.RLNM_CNFM_TKN_CODE) || ', 발급일자 : ' || TRIM(ISNC_DATE)
WHEN REGEXP_LIKE(A.ISNC_DATE, '[~!@#$%^&*_+\={}|;:".<>/?()-]') THEN '실명확인증표 발급일자 특수문자가 존재하는 경우 - 실명확인증증표 : ' ||TRIM(RLNM_CNFM_TKN_CODE) || ' ' ||(SELECT CMN_CDVL_NAME FROM SID.IDO_A_UWB_COM_CD_DTL WHERE DEL_YN= 'N' AND USE_YN = 'Y' AND CMN_CODE_ID = '06758' AND CMN_CDVL = A.RLNM_CNFM_TKN_CODE) || ', 발급일자 : ' || TRIM(ISNC_DATE)
WHEN A.ISNC_DATE > #{yyyymmdd} THEN '실명확인증표 발급일자 미래일자인 경우 - 실명확인증증표 : ' ||TRIM(RLNM_CNFM_TKN_CODE) || ' ' ||(SELECT CMN_CDVL_NAME FROM SID.IDO_A_UWB_COM_CD_DTL WHERE DEL_YN= 'N' AND USE_YN = 'Y' AND CMN_CODE_ID = '06758' AND CMN_CDVL = A.RLNM_CNFM_TKN_CODE) || ', 발급일자 : ' || TRIM(ISNC_DATE) END AS 사유 , SYSDATE , 'N' FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_DTLD A WHERE A.CDD_FLFL_DATE = #{yyyymmdd} AND (TRIM(A.ISNC_DATE) IS NULL OR A.ISNC_DATE > #{yyyymmdd} OR REGEXP_LIKE(A.ISNC_DATE, '[~!@#$%^&*_+\={}|;:".<>/?()-]')) AND TRIM(A.RLNM_CNFM_TKN_CODE) IS NOT NULL AND A.RGBR_CODE IN ('21080', '11670') --21080: 채널개발팀. 11670 : 디지털업무지원팀 AND A.CDD_CLNT_SECT_CODE = '1'

INSERT INTO SSQ.L_CDD_MNTN_DTLD ( MNTN_DATE , MNTN_STNR_CODE , CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID , CDD_FLFL_SQNO , MNTN_DTLS_CTNT , PRCE_DATE_TIME , ACTN_RSLT_SECT_CODE ) SELECT A.CDD_FLFL_DATE , 'CDD_305' , A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID , A.CDD_FLFL_SQNO , CASE WHEN REGEXP_LIKE(TRIM(A.TAGT_CLNT_NAME), '[~!@#$%^&*_+\={}|;:".<>/?()-]') THEN '특수문자 포함' WHEN REGEXP_LIKE(TRIM(A.TAGT_CLNT_NAME), '[0-9]') THEN '숫자 포함' WHEN REGEXP_LIKE(TRIM(A.TAGT_CLNT_NAME), '[a-z]') THEN '영문 포함' END , SYSDATE , 'N' FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_DTLD A WHERE A.DEL_YN <> 'Y' AND TRIM(A.CDD_FLFL_DATE) IS NOT NULL AND A.CLNT_RISK_RTNG_CODE IN ('H', 'M', 'L') AND A.RGBR_CODE IN ('21080', '11670') AND A.CDD_CLNT_SECT_CODE = '1' AND A.CDD_FLFL_DATE = #{yyyymmdd} AND REGEXP_LIKE(TRIM(A.TAGT_CLNT_NAME), '[a-z0-9~!@#$%^&*_+\={}|;:".<>/?()-]') AND A.NTNY_ID = 1000000001

INSERT INTO SSQ.L_CDD_MNTN_DTLD ( MNTN_DATE , MNTN_STNR_CODE , CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID , CDD_FLFL_SQNO , MNTN_DTLS_CTNT , PRCE_DATE_TIME , ACTN_RSLT_SECT_CODE ) SELECT A.CDD_FLFL_DATE , 'CDD_306' , A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID , A.CDD_FLFL_SQNO , CASE WHEN REGEXP_LIKE(A.TAGT_ENNM, '[가-힣]') THEN '한글이름 포함: ' ||TRIM(A.TAGT_ENNM) || CASE WHEN REGEXP_LIKE(A.TAGT_ENNM, '[~!@#$%^&*_+\={}|;:".<>/?]') THEN ', 특수기호 포함' ELSE '' END WHEN REGEXP_LIKE(A.TAGT_ENNM, '[~!@#$%^&*_+\={}|;:".<>/?]') THEN '특수기호 포함 : ' ||TRIM(A.TAGT_ENNM) END AS 사유 , SYSDATE , 'N' FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_DTLD A WHERE A.DEL_YN <> 'Y' AND TRIM(A.CDD_FLFL_DATE) IS NOT NULL AND A.CLNT_RISK_RTNG_CODE IN ('H', 'M', 'L') AND A.CDD_FLFL_DATE = #{yyyymmdd} AND A.RGBR_CODE IN ('21080', '11670') --21080: 채널개발팀. 11670 : 디지털업무지원팀 AND A.CDD_CLNT_SECT_CODE = '1' AND REGEXP_LIKE(A.TAGT_ENNM, '[가-힣~!@#$%^&*_+\={}|;:".<>/?]')

INSERT INTO SSQ.L_CDD_MNTN_DTLD ( MNTN_DATE , MNTN_STNR_CODE , CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID , CDD_FLFL_SQNO , MNTN_DTLS_CTNT , PRCE_DATE_TIME , ACTN_RSLT_SECT_CODE ) SELECT A.CDD_FLFL_DATE , 'CDD_307' , A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID , A.CDD_FLFL_SQNO , CASE WHEN REGEXP_LIKE(TRIM(B.NDVL_TRDG_PRPS_NAME), '[a-z0-9~!@#$%^&*_+\={}|;:"<>/?]') THEN '거래목적 특수문자/숫자/영문 포함' WHEN REGEXP_LIKE(TRIM(B.NDVL_FUNS_ORIG_NAME), '[a-z0-9~!@#$%^&*_+\={}|;:"<>/?]') THEN '자금원천 특수문자/숫자/영문 포함' WHEN REGEXP_LIKE(TRIM(B.INSN_TRDG_PRPS_NAME), '[a-z0-9~!@#$%^&*_+\={}|;:"<>/?]') THEN '거래목적 특수문자/숫자/영문 포함' WHEN REGEXP_LIKE(TRIM(B.INSN_FUNS_ORIG_NAME), '[a-z0-9~!@#$%^&*_+\={}|;:"<>/?]') THEN '자금원천 특수문자/숫자/영문 포함' END , SYSDATE , 'N' FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_DTLD A INNER JOIN SID.IDO_A_MAH_EDD_FLFL_DTLD B ON A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = B.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID AND A.CDD_FLFL_SQNO = B.CDD_FLFL_SQNO WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.DEL_YN <> 'Y' AND TRIM(A.CDD_FLFL_DATE) IS NOT NULL AND A.CLNT_RISK_RTNG_CODE IN ('H', 'M', 'L') AND A.CDD_FLFL_DATE = #{yyyymmdd} AND A.RGBR_CODE IN ('21080', '11670') --21080: 채널개발팀. 11670 : 디지털업무지원팀 AND A.CDD_CLNT_SECT_CODE = '1' AND A.EDD_TAGT_YN = 'Y' AND A.CDD_TAGT_SECT_CODE = '01' -- 본인
AND ((A.CDD_CLNT_SECT_CODE = '1' -- 개인 AND ((B.NDVL_TRDG_PRPS_CODE = '99' AND REGEXP_LIKE(TRIM(B.NDVL_TRDG_PRPS_NAME), '[a-z0-9~!@#$%^&*_+\={}|;:"<>/?]')) -- 개인거래목적코드 : 99.기타 OR (B.NDVL_FUNS_ORIG_CODE = '99' AND REGEXP_LIKE(TRIM(B.NDVL_FUNS_ORIG_NAME), '[a-z0-9~!@#$%^&*_+\={}|;:"<>/?]')))) -- 개인자금원천코드 : 99.기타
OR (A.CDD_CLNT_SECT_CODE IN ('2', '3') -- 법인 AND ((B.INSN_TRDG_PRPS_CODE = '99' AND REGEXP_LIKE(TRIM(B.INSN_TRDG_PRPS_NAME), '[a-z0-9~!@#$%^&*_+\={}|;:"<>/?]')) -- 법인거래목적코드 : 99.기타 OR (B.INSN_FUNS_ORIG_CODE = '99' AND REGEXP_LIKE(TRIM(B.INSN_FUNS_ORIG_NAME), '[a-z0-9~!@#$%^&*_+\={}|;:"<>/?]'))))) -- 법인자금원천코드 : 99.기타

INSERT INTO SSQ.L_CDD_MNTN_DTLD ( MNTN_DATE , MNTN_STNR_CODE , CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID , CDD_FLFL_SQNO , MNTN_DTLS_CTNT , PRCE_DATE_TIME , ACTN_RSLT_SECT_CODE ) SELECT A.CDD_FLFL_DATE , 'CDD_308' , A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID , A.CDD_FLFL_SQNO , CASE WHEN TRIM(A.JOB_NAME) = '기타' THEN '기타' || CASE WHEN REGEXP_LIKE(A.JOB_NAME, '[0-9]') THEN ', 숫자 포함' ELSE '' END WHEN TRIM(A.JOB_NAME) = '기타' THEN '기타' || CASE WHEN REGEXP_LIKE(A.JOB_NAME, '[~!@#$%^&*_+\={}|;:"<>/?]') THEN ', 특수기호 포함' ELSE '' END WHEN REGEXP_LIKE(A.JOB_NAME, '[0-9]') THEN '숫자 포함' || CASE WHEN REGEXP_LIKE(A.JOB_NAME, '[~!@#$%^&*_+\={}|;:"<>/?]') THEN ', 특수기호 포함' ELSE '' END WHEN REGEXP_LIKE(A.JOB_NAME, '[0-9]') THEN '숫자 포함' ELSE CASE WHEN REGEXP_LIKE(A.JOB_NAME, '[~!@#$%^&*_+\={}|;:"<>/?]') THEN '특수기호 포함' ELSE '' END END AS 사유 , SYSDATE , 'N' FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_DTLD A WHERE A.DEL_YN <> 'Y' AND TRIM(A.CDD_FLFL_DATE) IS NOT NULL AND A.CLNT_RISK_RTNG_CODE IN ('H', 'M', 'L') AND A.CDD_FLFL_DATE = #{yyyymmdd} AND A.RGBR_CODE IN ('21080', '11670') --21080: 채널개발팀. 11670 : 디지털업무지원팀 AND A.CDD_CLNT_SECT_CODE = '1' AND A.JOB_CODE = '990' AND (A.JOB_NAME = '기타' OR REGEXP_LIKE(A.JOB_NAME, '[0-9~!@#$%^&*_+\={}|;:"<>/?]'))

MERGE INTO SSQ.NIC93B A USING ( SELECT 'CDD000' AS JOB_ID , 'CDD모니터링 추출' AS JOB_NM , SYSDATE AS STRT_DY_TM , SYSDATE AS END_DY_TM , 'Y' AS LAST_YN FROM DUAL ) B ON ( A.JOB_ID = B.JOB_ID) WHEN Matched THEN UPDATE SET A.JOB_NM = B.JOB_NM , A.STRT_DY_TM = B.STRT_DY_TM -- , A.END_DY_TM = B.END_DY_TM , A.LAST_YN = B.LAST_YN
WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( JOB_ID , JOB_NM , STRT_DY_TM , END_DY_TM , LAST_YN ) VALUES ( B.JOB_ID , B.JOB_NM , B.STRT_DY_TM , B.END_DY_TM , B.LAST_YN )

MERGE INTO SSQ.NIC93B A USING ( SELECT 'CDD000' AS JOB_ID , 'CDD모니터링 추출' AS JOB_NM , SYSDATE AS STRT_DY_TM , SYSDATE AS END_DY_TM , 'Y' AS LAST_YN FROM DUAL ) B ON ( A.JOB_ID = B.JOB_ID) WHEN Matched THEN UPDATE SET A.JOB_NM = B.JOB_NM --, A.STRT_DY_TM = B.STRT_DY_TM , A.END_DY_TM = B.END_DY_TM , A.LAST_YN = B.LAST_YN
WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( JOB_ID , JOB_NM , STRT_DY_TM , END_DY_TM , LAST_YN ) VALUES ( B.JOB_ID , B.JOB_NM , B.STRT_DY_TM , B.END_DY_TM , B.LAST_YN )
